{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01E7QBkVG2ZjMkyvyUCM8ap9","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off\n    77→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    78→  if (isAuthor) {\n    79→    pendingApplicants = db\n    80→      .prepare(\n    81→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    82→         FROM listing_applications la\n    83→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    84→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    85→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    86→      )\n    87→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n    91→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    92→  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n    93→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n    94→  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n    95→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    96→    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    97→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    98→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  return NextResponse.json({\n   102→    listing: {\n   103→      ...safeListingData,\n   104→      members,\n   105→      memberCount: members.length,\n   106→      isMember,\n   107→      isAuthor,\n   108→      hasApplied,\n   109→      applicationStatus,\n   110→      pendingApplicants,\n   111→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   112→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   113→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→\n   118→export async function PATCH(\n   119→  req: NextRequest,\n   120→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   121→) {\n   122→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   123→  if (!session) {\n   124→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   125→  }\n   126→\n   127→  const { id } = await params;\n   128→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   129→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   130→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   131→  }\n   132→\n   133→  const listing = db\n   134→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   135→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   136→\n   137→  if (!listing) {\n   138→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   143→  }\n   144→\n   145→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   146→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   147→    return NextResponse.json(\n   148→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   149→      { status: 400 }\n   150→    );\n   151→  }\n   152→\n   153→  try {\n   154→    const body = await req.json();\n   155→    const {\n   156→      language,\n   157→      readingPace,\n   158→      startDate,\n   159→      meetingFormat,\n   160→      maxGroupSize,\n   161→      requiresApproval,\n   162→      platformPreference,\n   163→    } = body;\n   164→\n   165→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   166→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   167→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→    }\n   169→\n   170→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   171→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   172→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   173→      }\n   174→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   175→      if (startDate < today) {\n   176→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→      }\n   178→    }\n   179→\n   180→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   181→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   182→    }\n   183→\n   184→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   185→      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n   186→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n   187→      }\n   188→      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   189→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   190→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   191→      }\n   192→\n   193→      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n   194→      const memberCount = (db\n   195→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   196→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   197→\n   198→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   199→        return NextResponse.json(\n   200→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   201→          { status: 400 }\n   202→        );\n   203→      }\n   204→    }\n   205→\n   206→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   207→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   211→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   212→    }\n   213→\n   214→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   215→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   216→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   217→\n   218→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   220→      values.push(language);\n   221→    }\n   222→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   223→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   224→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   225→    }\n   226→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   227→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   228→      values.push(startDate);\n   229→    }\n   230→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   231→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   233→    }\n   234→    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n   235→    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n   236→    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n   237→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   238→      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   239→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   240→      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n   241→      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n   242→    }\n   243→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   244→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   245→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   246→    }\n   247→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   248→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   249→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   250→    }\n   251→\n   252→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   253→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   254→    }\n   255→\n   256→    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n   257→    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n   258→\n   259→    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n   260→    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n   261→    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   262→      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n   263→      const txValues = [...values];\n   264→\n   265→      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n   266→        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n   267→        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n   268→        const currentMemberCount = (db\n   269→          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   270→          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   271→\n   272→        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n   273→          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n   274→        }\n   275→\n   276→        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n   277→          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n   278→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   279→          txValues.push(1);\n   280→        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n   281→          // Group has room now — reopen it\n   282→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   283→          txValues.push(0);\n   284→        }\n   285→      }\n   286→\n   287→      txValues.push(listingId);\n   288→      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n   289→\n   290→      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n   291→      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n   292→      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n   293→        db.prepare(\n   294→          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   295→        ).run(listingId);\n   296→      }\n   297→\n   298→      return null;\n   299→    });\n   300→\n   301→    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n   302→    if (txResult?.error) {\n   303→      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n   304→    }\n   305→\n   306→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   307→  } catch (error) {\n   308→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   309→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   310→  }\n   311→}\n   312→\n   313→export async function DELETE(\n   314→  _req: NextRequest,\n   315→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   316→) {\n   317→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   318→  if (!session) {\n   319→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   320→  }\n   321→\n   322→  const { id } = await params;\n   323→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   324→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   325→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   326→  }\n   327→\n   328→  const listing = db\n   329→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   330→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   331→\n   332→  if (!listing) {\n   333→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   334→  }\n   335→\n   336→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   337→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   338→  }\n   339→\n   340→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   341→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   342→    return NextResponse.json(\n   343→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   344→      { status: 400 }\n   345→    );\n   346→  }\n   347→\n   348→  try {\n   349→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   350→    const members = db\n   351→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   352→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   353→\n   354→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   355→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   356→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   357→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   358→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   359→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   360→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   361→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   362→    });\n   363→\n   364→    deleteTransaction();\n   365→\n   366→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   367→    for (const member of members) {\n   368→      try {\n   369→        createNotification(\n   370→          member.user_id,\n   371→          null,\n   372→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   373→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   374→        );\n   375→      } catch {\n   376→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   377→      }\n   378→    }\n   379→\n   380→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   381→  } catch (error) {\n   382→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   383→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   384→  }\n   385→}\n   386→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"c9b55ec9-6d1d-4cda-b1cf-947facb0e199","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:22.255Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NwcmZqLyMH7nCYXw9ikZjQ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     8→  if (!session) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n    13→  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n    14→  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n    15→  if (!allowed) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n    18→      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const {\n    25→      bookTitle,\n    26→      bookAuthor,\n    27→      bookCoverUrl,\n    28→      bookOlid,\n    29→      language,\n    30→      readingPace,\n    31→      startDate,\n    32→      meetingFormat,\n    33→      maxGroupSize,\n    34→      requiresApproval,\n    35→      platformPreference,\n    36→    } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    39→      return NextResponse.json(\n    40→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    41→        { status: 400 }\n    42→      );\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    // Type check all string fields to prevent coercion bypasses\n    46→    if (typeof bookTitle !== \"string\" || typeof bookAuthor !== \"string\" ||\n    47→        typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || typeof startDate !== \"string\" ||\n    48→        typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\") {\n    49→      return NextResponse.json(\n    50→        { error: \"Invalid field types\" },\n    51→        { status: 400 }\n    52→      );\n    53→    }\n    54→\n    55→    if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n    56→      return NextResponse.json(\n    57→        { error: \"Invalid group size\" },\n    58→        { status: 400 }\n    59→      );\n    60→    }\n    61→\n    62→    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    63→    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n    64→      return NextResponse.json(\n    65→        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n    66→        { status: 400 }\n    67→      );\n    68→    }\n    69→\n    70→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    71→      return NextResponse.json(\n    72→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    73→        { status: 400 }\n    74→      );\n    75→    }\n    76→\n    77→    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n    78→      return NextResponse.json(\n    79→        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n    80→        { status: 400 }\n    81→      );\n    82→    }\n    83→\n    84→    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    85→    if (startDate < today) {\n    86→      return NextResponse.json(\n    87→        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n    88→        { status: 400 }\n    89→      );\n    90→    }\n    91→\n    92→    const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n    93→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    94→      return NextResponse.json(\n    95→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    96→        { status: 400 }\n    97→      );\n    98→    }\n    99→\n   100→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n   101→      ? platformPreference\n   102→      : \"telegram\";\n   103→\n   104→    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n   105→    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n   106→      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n   107→      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n   108→        ? bookCoverUrl\n   109→        : \"\";\n   110→\n   111→    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n   112→    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   113→      const result = db\n   114→        .prepare(\n   115→          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n   116→           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n   117→        )\n   118→        .run(\n   119→          session.userId,\n   120→          bookTitle.trim(),\n   121→          bookAuthor.trim(),\n   122→          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n   123→          bookOlid || \"\",\n   124→          language || \"English\",\n   125→          readingPace.trim(),\n   126→          startDate,\n   127→          meetingFormat,\n   128→          size,\n   129→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   130→          platform\n   131→        );\n   132→\n   133→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   134→      db.prepare(\n   135→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   136→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   137→\n   138→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   139→    });\n   140→\n   141→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   142→\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { id: listingId },\n   145→      { status: 201 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  } catch (error) {\n   148→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   149→    return NextResponse.json(\n   150→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   151→      { status: 500 }\n   152→    );\n   153→  }\n   154→}\n {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01YbYXhkyxe2wCmfxksTiSVk","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_017RS9y8BtBUEQp7YVVWzwi3","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8746,"cache_read_input_tokens":21477,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8746,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"68cb41ff-e449-4ed7-bd05-1d0957c71dc9"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EnLSG6cc8F6GGxmAN17imj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"97d3958e-7db2-4f71-ae11-31f7228fe79b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:25.496Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017RS9y8BtBUEQp7YVVWzwi3","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"5418b0fa-0270-406b-b94c-da1699003268","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:25.494Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HLewmGa4Pf2bKSq2vrCN2K","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await getSession();\n     7→\n     8→  if (!session.userId) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  const user = db\n    13→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    14→    .get(session.userId) as\n    15→    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    16→    | undefined;\n    17→\n    18→  if (!user) {\n    19→    await session.destroy();\n    20→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    21→  }\n    22→\n    23→  // Include unread notification count to avoid a second round-trip from the Navbar\n    24→  const unread = db\n    25→    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\")\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    user: {\n    30→      id: user.id,\n    31→      email: user.email,\n    32→      displayName: user.display_name,\n    33→      bio: user.bio,\n    34→      unreadNotificationCount: unread.count,\n    35→    },\n    36→  });\n    37→}\n    38→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"ac1ea6e5-44c6-427e-950f-1e81f171d790","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:25.906Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DyKq3fMumkJ74DBUUzVtXH","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"b29ae53f-2148-4f48-ab0b-85c1f55fe7ae","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:29.585Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a624d29c4716e91ef","tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","description":"Reading app/api/notifications/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":33827,"tool_uses":17,"duration_ms":22421},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"dcbaee69-5d46-40f1-92de-28cf71d6910f","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01UpNsdsNUeff9qpuSpURGyB","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018tjRbEzuEUtKePBwgaGBC7","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/notifications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3011,"cache_read_input_tokens":30223,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3011,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"06b7636d-7132-4290-b7e1-7dd7e6fb5e06"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018tjRbEzuEUtKePBwgaGBC7","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    54→    ).run(session.userId);\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"3215b278-571e-4cfe-b650-32223d440d37","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:30.099Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RRJnpTV9t95V1F2F1atUWU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment !== undefined && comment !== null && typeof comment !== \"string\") {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be a string\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (comment && typeof comment === \"string\" && comment.length > 1000) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    80→  const listing = db\n    81→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    82→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    87→      { status: 404 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    92→    return NextResponse.json(\n    93→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    94→      { status: 400 }\n    95→    );\n    96→  }\n    97→\n    98→  // Verify both users are members\n    99→  const raterMember = db\n   100→    .prepare(\n   101→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   102→    )\n   103→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   104→\n   105→  if (!raterMember) {\n   106→    return NextResponse.json(\n   107→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   108→      { status: 403 }\n   109→    );\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  const ratedMember = db\n   113→    .prepare(\n   114→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   115→    )\n   116→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   117→\n   118→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   119→    return NextResponse.json(\n   120→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   121→      { status: 400 }\n   122→    );\n   123→  }\n   124→\n   125→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   126→  const existing = db\n   127→    .prepare(\n   128→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   129→    )\n   130→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (existing) {\n   133→    db.prepare(\n   134→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   135→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   136→  } else {\n   137→    db.prepare(\n   138→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   139→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   140→\n   141→    // Notify the rated user\n   142→    createNotification(\n   143→      ratedUserId,\n   144→      listingId,\n   145→      \"rating_received\",\n   146→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   151→}\n   152→\n   153→/**\n   154→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   155→ *\n   156→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   157→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   158→ */\n   159→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   160→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   161→  if (!session) {\n   162→    return NextResponse.json(\n   163→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   164→      { status: 401 }\n   165→    );\n   166→  }\n   167→\n   168→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   169→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   176→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   177→    return NextResponse.json(\n   178→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   179→      { status: 400 }\n   180→    );\n   181→  }\n   182→\n   183→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   184→  const isMember = db\n   185→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   186→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   187→  if (!isMember) {\n   188→    return NextResponse.json(\n   189→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   190→      { status: 403 }\n   191→    );\n   192→  }\n   193→\n   194→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   195→  const givenRatings = db\n   196→    .prepare(\n   197→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   198→       FROM ratings r\n   199→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   200→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   201→    )\n   202→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   203→      rated_user_id: number;\n   204→      score: number;\n   205→      comment: string;\n   206→      display_name: string;\n   207→    }[];\n   208→\n   209→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   210→  const receivedRatings = db\n   211→    .prepare(\n   212→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   213→       FROM ratings r\n   214→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   215→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   216→    )\n   217→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   218→      rater_id: number;\n   219→      score: number;\n   220→      comment: string;\n   221→      display_name: string;\n   222→    }[];\n   223→\n   224→  return NextResponse.json({\n   225→    givenRatings,\n   226→    receivedRatings,\n   227→  });\n   228→}\n   229→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"860ae3fb-b5c4-4ed9-95a4-4c870cf7fb68","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:30.231Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0154oEbJy1pjgeQswujPcJq2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n     6→ * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n     7→ * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n    11→ * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n    12→ * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n    13→ * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n    18→\n    19→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    20→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n    21→}\n    22→\n    23→/**\n    24→ * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n    25→ */\n    26→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    27→  method: string,\n    28→  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n    29→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n    30→  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    31→    method: \"POST\",\n    32→    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    33→    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n    34→  });\n    35→  return res.json();\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→/**\n    39→ * Get bot info (username, id).\n    40→ */\n    41→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    42→  id: number;\n    43→  username: string;\n    44→  first_name: string;\n    45→} | null> {\n    46→  const res = await callApi<{\n    47→    id: number;\n    48→    username: string;\n    49→    first_name: string;\n    50→  }>(\"getMe\");\n    51→  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→/**\n    55→ * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n    56→ * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n    57→ *\n    58→ * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n    59→ *\n    60→ * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n    61→ * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n    62→ */\n    63→export async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n    64→  listingId: number\n    65→): Promise<string | null> {\n    66→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    67→  if (!bot) return null;\n    68→  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n    69→}\n    70→\n    71→/**\n    72→ * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n    73→ */\n    74→export async function createChatInviteLink(\n    75→  chatId: number | string\n    76→): Promise<string | null> {\n    77→  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    78→    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    79→    {\n    80→      chat_id: chatId,\n    81→      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n    82→      creates_join_request: false,\n    83→    }\n    84→  );\n    85→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    86→    return res.result.invite_link;\n    87→  }\n    88→  return null;\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n    93→ */\n    94→export async function exportChatInviteLink(\n    95→  chatId: number | string\n    96→): Promise<string | null> {\n    97→  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    98→    chat_id: chatId,\n    99→  });\n   100→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n   101→    return res.result;\n   102→  }\n   103→  return null;\n   104→}\n   105→\n   106→/**\n   107→ * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n   108→ * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n   109→ * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n   110→ */\n   111→export function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n   112→  return text\n   113→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n   114→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n   115→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n   116→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n   117→}\n   118→\n   119→/**\n   120→ * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n   121→ */\n   122→export async function sendMessage(\n   123→  chatId: number | string,\n   124→  text: string\n   125→): Promise<boolean> {\n   126→  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n   127→    chat_id: chatId,\n   128→    text,\n   129→    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n   130→  });\n   131→  return res.ok;\n   132→}\n   133→\n   134→/**\n   135→ * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n   136→ */\n   137→export async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n   138→  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n   139→    url,\n   140→    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n   141→  });\n   142→  return res.ok;\n   143→}\n   144→\n   145→/**\n   146→ * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n   147→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   148→ */\n   149→export function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n   150→  payload: string\n   151→): number | null {\n   152→  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   153→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   154→}\n   155→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"7f67821c-a844-40e7-a097-b9d5ee75945b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:34.106Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a624d29c4716e91ef","tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","description":"Reading lib/discord.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":38097,"tool_uses":20,"duration_ms":26470},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"2680db3b-7b0f-4d5f-86c5-6c73373def12","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01WJRyfPDC7E9A7qL3ZY5Qip","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01C19QJEr5CMAZ9eHGUDWQ3J","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4166,"cache_read_input_tokens":33234,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4166,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"62f085e7-c0ff-4dfd-a44f-e33c887cd91a"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01C19QJEr5CMAZ9eHGUDWQ3J","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n     6→ * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n     7→ * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n    11→ * - Author adds bot to their server\n    12→ * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n    13→ * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n    18→const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n    19→\n    20→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    21→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→/**\n    25→ * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n    26→ * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n    27→ */\n    28→export function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n    29→  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n    30→}\n    31→\n    32→/**\n    33→ * Call the Discord REST API.\n    34→ */\n    35→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    36→  endpoint: string,\n    37→  method: string = \"GET\",\n    38→  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n    39→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n    40→  try {\n    41→    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n    42→      method,\n    43→      headers: {\n    44→        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n    45→        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n    46→      },\n    47→      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    48→    });\n    49→\n    50→    if (!res.ok) {\n    51→      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    52→      return {\n    53→        ok: false,\n    54→        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n    55→      };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    59→    return { ok: true, data };\n    60→  } catch (err) {\n    61→    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n    62→  }\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * Get bot user info.\n    67→ */\n    68→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    69→  id: string;\n    70→  username: string;\n    71→} | null> {\n    72→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n    73→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→/**\n    77→ * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n    78→ * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n    79→ *\n    80→ * Permission bits:\n    81→ * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n    82→ * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n    83→ * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n    84→ * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n    85→ * Total: 3089\n    86→ */\n    87→export function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n    88→  const permissions = 3089;\n    89→  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n    90→  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n    91→}\n    92→\n    93→/**\n    94→ * Create a text channel in a guild.\n    95→ */\n    96→export async function createTextChannel(\n    97→  guildId: string,\n    98→  name: string,\n    99→  topic?: string\n   100→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   101→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   102→    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n   103→    \"POST\",\n   104→    {\n   105→      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n   106→      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n   107→      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n   108→    }\n   109→  );\n   110→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→/**\n   114→ * Create an invite for a channel.\n   115→ */\n   116→export async function createChannelInvite(\n   117→  channelId: string,\n   118→  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n   119→): Promise<string | null> {\n   120→  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n   121→    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n   122→    \"POST\",\n   123→    {\n   124→      max_age: maxAge,\n   125→      max_uses: 0,\n   126→      unique: true,\n   127→    }\n   128→  );\n   129→  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n   130→    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n   131→  }\n   132→  return null;\n   133→}\n   134→\n   135→/**\n   136→ * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n   137→ */\n   138→export async function sendChannelMessage(\n   139→  channelId: string,\n   140→  content: string\n   141→): Promise<boolean> {\n   142→  const res = await callApi(\n   143→    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n   144→    \"POST\",\n   145→    { content }\n   146→  );\n   147→  return res.ok;\n   148→}\n   149→\n   150→/**\n   151→ * Get guild (server) info.\n   152→ */\n   153→export async function getGuild(\n   154→  guildId: string\n   155→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   156→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   157→    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n   158→  );\n   159→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   160→}\n   161→\n   162→/**\n   163→ * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n   164→ */\n   165→export async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n   166→  { id: string; name: string }[]\n   167→> {\n   168→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n   169→    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n   170→  );\n   171→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n   172→}\n   173→\n   174→/**\n   175→ * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n   176→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   177→ */\n   178→export function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n   179→  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   180→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   181→}\n   182→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"17e5bf05-eb2a-4c34-b96c-51fb9ad99db6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:34.138Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XXpXHHmKh2DN3fRB1WsZbZ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n     3→ * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n     4→ * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n     5→ */\n     6→\n     7→interface RateLimitEntry {\n     8→  timestamps: number[];\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→const store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n    12→\n    13→// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n    14→// Guard against multiple intervals on Next.js hot reload\n    15→const CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n    16→const globalObj = globalThis as unknown as { __rateLimitCleanup?: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> };\n    17→if (!globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup) {\n    18→  globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\n    19→    const now = Date.now();\n    20→    for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n    21→      entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n    22→      if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n    23→        store.delete(key);\n    24→      }\n    25→    }\n    26→  }, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n    27→}\n    28→\n    29→/**\n    30→ * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n    31→ * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n    32→ * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n    33→ * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n    34→ * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n    35→ */\n    36→export function checkRateLimit(\n    37→  key: string,\n    38→  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n    39→  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n    40→): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n    41→  const now = Date.now();\n    42→  let entry = store.get(key);\n    43→\n    44→  if (!entry) {\n    45→    // Prevent unbounded memory growth under attack\n    46→    if (store.size > 50_000) {\n    47→      return { allowed: false, retryAfter: 60 };\n    48→    }\n    49→    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    50→    store.set(key, entry);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  // Remove expired timestamps\n    54→  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n    55→\n    56→  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    57→    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    58→    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    59→    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n    60→  }\n    61→\n    62→  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n    63→  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n    64→}\n    65→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"85e1b725-f3f2-4635-b158-4ce40abae8d5","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:34.577Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01XZXzDkiX1q4RLRMbyt1iv3","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01An1WK4Pm7pksiRGcjVnaRA","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5151,"cache_read_input_tokens":37400,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5151,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"71c87582-6835-4ab9-8c72-075a0b006927"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01An1WK4Pm7pksiRGcjVnaRA","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    12→\n    13→/**\n    14→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    15→ *\n    16→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    17→ *\n    18→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    19→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    20→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    21→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    22→ *\n    23→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    24→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    25→ */\n    26→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    27→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    28→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    29→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    31→  }\n    32→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    33→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    38→  try {\n    39→    update = await req.json();\n    40→  } catch {\n    41→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    45→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    46→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    47→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    52→  if (update.message) {\n    53→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→\n    60→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    61→  chat: {\n    62→    id: number;\n    63→    title?: string;\n    64→    type: string;\n    65→  };\n    66→  from: {\n    67→    id: number;\n    68→    first_name: string;\n    69→  };\n    70→  new_chat_member: {\n    71→    user: {\n    72→      id: number;\n    73→      is_bot: boolean;\n    74→    };\n    75→    status: string;\n    76→  };\n    77→}\n    78→\n    79→interface TelegramMessage {\n    80→  chat: {\n    81→    id: number;\n    82→    type: string;\n    83→    title?: string;\n    84→  };\n    85→  text?: string;\n    86→  from?: {\n    87→    id: number;\n    88→  };\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    93→ *\n    94→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    95→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    96→ * 1. Creates the group\n    97→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    98→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    99→ *\n   100→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n   101→ */\n   102→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   103→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   104→\n   105→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   106→  if (\n   107→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   108→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   109→  ) {\n   110→    return;\n   111→  }\n   112→\n   113→  // Only process group chats\n   114→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   115→    return;\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   119→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   120→  const pending = db\n   121→    .prepare(\n   122→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   123→    )\n   124→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   125→\n   126→  if (pending) {\n   127→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   128→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   129→      chat.id\n   130→    );\n   131→    return;\n   132→  }\n   133→\n   134→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   135→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   136→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   137→  await sendMessage(\n   138→    chat.id,\n   139→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   140→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   141→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   142→  );\n   143→\n   144→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   145→  try {\n   146→    db.prepare(\n   147→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   148→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   149→  } catch {\n   150→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   151→  }\n   152→}\n   153→\n   154→/**\n   155→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   156→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   157→ */\n   158→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   159→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   160→    return;\n   161→  }\n   162→\n   163→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   164→\n   165→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   166→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   167→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   168→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   169→    if (listingId) {\n   170→      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n   171→      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   172→      if (!telegramUserId) {\n   173→        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   174→        return;\n   175→      }\n   176→\n   177→      const linkedUser = db\n   178→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   179→        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   180→\n   181→      if (linkedUser) {\n   182→        const listing = db\n   183→          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   184→          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n   185→\n   186→        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n   187→          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   188→          return;\n   189→        }\n   190→      }\n   191→\n   192→      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n   193→      await sendMessage(\n   194→        message.chat.id,\n   195→        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n   196→      );\n   197→      return;\n   198→    }\n   199→  }\n   200→\n   201→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   202→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   203→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   204→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   205→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   206→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   207→      return;\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   211→    const linkedUser = db\n   212→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   213→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   214→\n   215→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   216→      await sendMessage(\n   217→        message.chat.id,\n   218→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   219→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   220→      );\n   221→      return;\n   222→    }\n   223→\n   224→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   225→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   226→      .prepare(\n   227→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   228→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   229→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   230→         AND author_id = ?\n   231→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   232→      )\n   233→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   234→\n   235→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   236→      await sendMessage(\n   237→        message.chat.id,\n   238→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   239→      );\n   240→      return;\n   241→    }\n   242→\n   243→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   244→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   245→      return;\n   246→    }\n   247→\n   248→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   249→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n   250→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   251→    await sendMessage(\n   252→      message.chat.id,\n   253→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   254→    );\n   255→    return;\n   256→  }\n   257→\n   258→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   259→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   260→  if (linkMatch) {\n   261→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   262→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   263→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   264→      return;\n   265→    }\n   266→\n   267→    const linkedUser = db\n   268→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   269→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   270→\n   271→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   272→      await sendMessage(\n   273→        message.chat.id,\n   274→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   275→      );\n   276→      return;\n   277→    }\n   278→\n   279→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   280→\n   281→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   282→    const listing = db\n   283→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   284→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   285→\n   286→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   287→      await sendMessage(\n   288→        message.chat.id,\n   289→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   290→      );\n   291→      return;\n   292→    }\n   293→\n   294→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   295→      await sendMessage(\n   296→        message.chat.id,\n   297→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   298→      );\n   299→      return;\n   300→    }\n   301→\n   302→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   303→  }\n   304→}\n   305→\n   306→/**\n   307→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   308→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   309→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   310→ * 3. Notify all members\n   311→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   312→ */\n   313→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   314→  const listing = db\n   315→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   316→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   317→\n   318→  if (!listing) {\n   319→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   320→    return;\n   321→  }\n   322→\n   323→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   324→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   325→    return;\n   326→  }\n   327→\n   328→  // Try to create an invite link\n   329→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   330→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   331→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   332→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   333→  }\n   334→\n   335→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   336→    await sendMessage(\n   337→      chatId,\n   338→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   339→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   340→    );\n   341→    return;\n   342→  }\n   343→\n   344→  // Save to database\n   345→  db.prepare(\n   346→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   347→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   348→\n   349→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   350→  const members = db\n   351→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   352→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   353→\n   354→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   355→  for (const member of members) {\n   356→    createNotification(\n   357→      member.user_id,\n   358→      listingId,\n   359→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   360→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   361→    );\n   362→  }\n   363→\n   364→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   365→  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n   366→  await sendMessage(\n   367→    chatId,\n   368→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   369→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   370→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   371→  );\n   372→}\n   373→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"9ade0f58-2900-4db5-819d-cdcc99d363d2","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:37.917Z"}
