{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01E8Er3KDhH3XBtmHMyg63NH","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     9→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    14→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    15→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    18→      { status: 500 }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  const body = await req.json();\n    23→  if (!body.secret || typeof body.secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(body.secret, setupSecret)) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json(\n    29→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    30→      { status: 500 }\n    31→    );\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    35→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    38→      { status: 500 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    43→  if (!bot) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    46→      { status: 500 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    51→  if (!success) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    54→      { status: 500 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  return NextResponse.json({\n    59→    ok: true,\n    60→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    61→    webhookUrl,\n    62→  });\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    67→ *\n    68→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    69→ */\n    70→export async function GET() {\n    71→  return NextResponse.json({\n    72→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    73→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    74→  });\n    75→}\n    76→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"c9783a04-50b3-447e-940b-d0455c7d8f7d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:38.061Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01XZXzDkiX1q4RLRMbyt1iv3","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01LomGxHqLk5hK2JvpqBXXeX","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5151,"cache_read_input_tokens":37400,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5151,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"4ef00727-11b2-4291-a604-a6bd4592fdec"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LomGxHqLk5hK2JvpqBXXeX","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→  isValidSnowflake,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    11→\n    12→/**\n    13→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    14→ *\n    15→ * This endpoint handles:\n    16→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    17→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    18→ *\n    19→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    20→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    21→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    22→ */\n    23→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    24→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    25→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    26→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    28→  }\n    29→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    30→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  try {\n    35→    const body = await req.json();\n    36→    const { type } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    39→      return handleLink(body);\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    43→    if (type === 1) {\n    44→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    46→    }\n    47→\n    48→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    49→  } catch (err) {\n    50→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→}\n    57→\n    58→async function handleLink(body: {\n    59→  guildId: string;\n    60→  listingId: number;\n    61→  channelId?: string;\n    62→}) {\n    63→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    64→\n    65→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n    80→  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    81→    return NextResponse.json(\n    82→      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n    83→      { status: 400 }\n    84→    );\n    85→  }\n    86→  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    87→    return NextResponse.json(\n    88→      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n    89→      { status: 400 }\n    90→    );\n    91→  }\n    92→\n    93→  const listing = db\n    94→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    95→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    96→\n    97→  if (!listing) {\n    98→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n   102→    return NextResponse.json(\n   103→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n   104→      { status: 400 }\n   105→    );\n   106→  }\n   107→\n   108→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n   109→    return NextResponse.json(\n   110→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n   111→      { status: 400 }\n   112→    );\n   113→  }\n   114→\n   115→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n   116→\n   117→  // If no channel specified, create one\n   118→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n   119→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n   120→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n   121→      .toLowerCase()\n   122→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   123→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   124→\n   125→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   126→      guildId,\n   127→      channelName,\n   128→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   129→    );\n   130→\n   131→    if (!channel) {\n   132→      return NextResponse.json(\n   133→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   134→        { status: 500 }\n   135→      );\n   136→    }\n   137→\n   138→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  // Create invite link\n   142→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   143→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   144→    return NextResponse.json(\n   145→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   146→      { status: 500 }\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  // Save to DB\n   151→  db.prepare(\n   152→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   153→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   154→\n   155→  // Notify all members\n   156→  const members = db\n   157→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   158→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   159→\n   160→  for (const member of members) {\n   161→    createNotification(\n   162→      member.user_id,\n   163→      listingId,\n   164→      \"discord_ready\",\n   165→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→\n   169→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   170→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   171→    targetChannelId,\n   172→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   173→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   174→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   175→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   176→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   177→  );\n   178→\n   179→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   180→}\n   181→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"5aded8fa-c775-4838-82e6-e6ea2b64075e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:38.464Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01UB8YeoB37h4KNSeDTYvrLV","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     7→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    14→\n    15→  if (!setupSecret || !secret || typeof secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(secret, setupSecret)) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    18→      { status: 403 }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json(\n    24→      {\n    25→        error:\n    26→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    27→      },\n    28→      { status: 503 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    33→  if (!botInfo) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json(\n    35→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    36→      { status: 500 }\n    37→    );\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  return NextResponse.json({\n    41→    ok: true,\n    42→    bot: {\n    43→      id: botInfo.id,\n    44→      username: botInfo.username,\n    45→    },\n    46→    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n    47→  });\n    48→}\n    49→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"263be176-ffbb-4876-b224-c4c9562b4b6a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:38.655Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Qb9sJXwsShwosmNwgWUoGK","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    52→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    53→    listingId\n    54→  );\n    55→\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"e1140214-1e50-4e98-9864-b09edd0b7b76","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:42.386Z"}

  2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (\n    45→    !discordLink ||\n    46→    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    47→    !(\n    48→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    49→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    50→    )\n    51→  ) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      {\n    54→        error:\n    55→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n    56→      },\n    57→      { status: 400 }\n    58→    );\n    59→  }\n    60→\n    61→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    62→    discordLink.trim(),\n    63→    listingId\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    67→}\n    68→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"a3ce3219-739a-416b-9add-cc7be219a902","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:42.801Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Ex9N71cKUc1YspF69mo2tx","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"de4a84bc-e441-4aa7-8455-d6fa2eed2415","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:43.235Z"}

  2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json(\n    13→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    14→      { status: 401 }\n    15→    );\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n    21→      { status: 503 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  const { id } = await params;\n    26→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    27→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const listing = db\n    32→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    33→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json(\n    41→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n    42→      { status: 403 }\n    43→    );\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n    49→      { status: 400 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n    61→\n    62→  return NextResponse.json({\n    63→    inviteUrl,\n    64→    instructions:\n    65→      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n    66→      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n    67→  });\n    68→}\n    69→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"84f4054d-7c2c-4316-b7d8-3418cae31cb1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:43.476Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_016NPUXJsJimEKXV7YtfbNpr","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014hVqk7rFEcKPWmgLLS9vhr","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/genres/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3540,"cache_read_input_tokens":51162,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3540,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"0617d3d8-44bb-434a-896d-e370fb6ed626"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014hVqk7rFEcKPWmgLLS9vhr","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"f53ec803-d699-4ebe-830f-c38360355f29","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:46.623Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_016NPUXJsJimEKXV7YtfbNpr","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0184qTzXHKeNBnYxJ4jr6XsU","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reading/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3540,"cache_read_input_tokens":51162,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3540,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"800afc54-34b6-46c4-9ae0-9ecf6e1490bb"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0184qTzXHKeNBnYxJ4jr6XsU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  discord_link: string;\n    16→  member_count: number;\n    17→  max_group_size: number;\n    18→  author_name: string;\n    19→  joined_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export async function GET() {\n    23→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    24→  if (!session) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    29→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    30→    SELECT\n    31→      l.id,\n    32→      l.book_title,\n    33→      l.book_author,\n    34→      l.book_cover_url,\n    35→      l.reading_pace,\n    36→      l.start_date,\n    37→      l.meeting_format,\n    38→      l.is_full,\n    39→      l.telegram_link,\n    40→      l.discord_link,\n    41→      l.max_group_size,\n    42→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    43→      lm.joined_at,\n    44→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    45→    FROM listing_members lm\n    46→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    47→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    48→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    49→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    50→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    51→\n    52→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    53→\n    54→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    55→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    56→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    57→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    58→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    59→\n    60→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    61→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    62→  const active = readings.filter(\n    63→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({\n    67→    active,\n    68→    history,\n    69→    upcoming,\n    70→    total: readings.length,\n    71→  });\n    72→}\n    73→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"1c194a00-cc9e-498f-b638-7d808d0adb10","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:46.943Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_016NPUXJsJimEKXV7YtfbNpr","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01CKU3SX2bNFrPkhp4At13Gg","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3540,"cache_read_input_tokens":51162,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3540,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"39484617-6508-4550-a3f6-cc9bbda1834c"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CKU3SX2bNFrPkhp4At13Gg","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"2c1acce4-6256-412e-9a95-7f62b162c2e9","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:47.345Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01J7cbqQda78b8U5GqDU9va7","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { timingSafeEqual } from \"crypto\";\n     2→\n     3→/**\n     4→ * Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks.\n     5→ * Use this for comparing secrets (webhook tokens, setup secrets, etc.)\n     6→ */\n     7→export function safeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {\n     8→  const bufA = Buffer.from(a);\n     9→  const bufB = Buffer.from(b);\n    10→  if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {\n    11→    // Do a dummy comparison to add some constant work, though this does not\n    12→    // fully mask length differences (bufA self-compare time varies with length).\n    13→    // In practice, the secrets compared here are fixed-length env vars.\n    14→    timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);\n    15→    return false;\n    16→  }\n    17→  return timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufB);\n    18→}\n    19→\n    20→/**\n    21→ * Escape user-controlled content for safe embedding in HTML emails.\n    22→ */\n    23→export function escapeHtmlForEmail(text: string): string {\n    24→  return text\n    25→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    26→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    27→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    28→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    29→    .replace(/'/g, \"&#039;\");\n    30→}\n    31→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"4b3381aa-a7f4-4a9b-a143-e48e45f40eef","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:47.576Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01MuWksjjsNxWDfPdeB6jj9B","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01VgFoCndqFtFrHXDb38QKUF","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/health/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3998,"cache_read_input_tokens":54702,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3998,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"b4f406f7-e8fc-478d-8738-feedc78d2053"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VgFoCndqFtFrHXDb38QKUF","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const startTime = Date.now();\n     6→\n     7→export async function GET() {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    // Check database connectivity\n    10→    const dbCheck = db.prepare(\"SELECT 1 AS ok\").get() as { ok: number } | undefined;\n    11→    const dbOk = dbCheck?.ok === 1;\n    12→\n    13→    const response: Record<string, unknown> = {\n    14→      status: \"healthy\",\n    15→      uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n    16→      database: dbOk ? \"connected\" : \"error\",\n    17→      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    18→    };\n    19→\n    20→    // Only expose detailed stats to authenticated users\n    21→    try {\n    22→      const session = await getSession();\n    23→      if (session?.userId) {\n    24→        const stats = db.prepare(`\n    25→          SELECT\n    26→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS users,\n    27→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings) AS listings,\n    28→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings WHERE is_full = 0) AS open_listings\n    29→        `).get() as { users: number; listings: number; open_listings: number };\n    30→\n    31→        response.stats = {\n    32→          users: stats.users,\n    33→          listings: stats.listings,\n    34→          openListings: stats.open_listings,\n    35→        };\n    36→      }\n    37→    } catch {\n    38→      // Session check failed (e.g., no cookies context) — skip stats\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    return NextResponse.json(response);\n    42→  } catch (error) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      {\n    45→        status: \"unhealthy\",\n    46→        uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n    47→        database: \"error\",\n    48→        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n    49→        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    50→      },\n    51→      { status: 503 }\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→}\n    55→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"c9b846a8-8e8b-4b4f-849b-71269afb3e85","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:01:50.744Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Dj5zDGSV5XeReureKK3Vxs","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     5→\n     6→interface BookResult {\n     7→  key: string;\n     8→  title: string;\n     9→  author_name?: string[];\n    10→  cover_i?: number;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→interface Props {\n    14→  onSelect: (book: {\n    15→    title: string;\n    16→    author: string;\n    17→    coverUrl: string;\n    18→    olid: string;\n    19→  }) => void;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    23→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    24→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    26→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    27→  const [searchError, setSearchError] = useState(false);\n    28→  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n    29→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    30→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    31→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    32→  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    33→\n    34→  useEffect(() => {\n    35→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    36→      if (\n    37→        containerRef.current &&\n    38→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    39→      ) {\n    40→        setOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  useEffect(() => {\n    48→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    49→      setResults([]);\n    50→      return;\n    51→    }\n    52→\n    53→    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    54→    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    55→\n    56→    const controller = new AbortController();\n    57→    abortRef.current = controller;\n    58→\n    59→    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n    60→      setLoading(true);\n    61→      setSearchError(false);\n    62→      try {\n    63→        const res = await fetch(\n    64→          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n    65→          { signal: controller.signal }\n    66→        );\n    67→        const data = await res.json();\n    68→        setResults(data.docs || []);\n    69→        setOpen(true);\n    70→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n    71→      } catch (err) {\n    72→        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n    73→          setResults([]);\n    74→          setSearchError(true);\n    75→        }\n    76→      } finally {\n    77→        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n    78→          setLoading(false);\n    79→        }\n    80→      }\n    81→    }, 400);\n    82→\n    83→    return () => {\n    84→      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    85→      controller.abort();\n    86→    };\n    87→  }, [query]);\n    88→\n    89→  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    90→    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    91→    onSelect({\n    92→      title: book.title,\n    93→      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n    94→      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n    95→        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n    96→        : \"\",\n    97→      olid,\n    98→    });\n    99→    setQuery(book.title);\n   100→    setOpen(false);\n   101→    setActiveIndex(-1);\n   102→  };\n   103→\n   104→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n   105→    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n   106→\n   107→    switch (e.key) {\n   108→      case \"ArrowDown\":\n   109→        e.preventDefault();\n   110→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n   111→        break;\n   112→      case \"ArrowUp\":\n   113→        e.preventDefault();\n   114→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n   115→        break;\n   116→      case \"Enter\":\n   117→        e.preventDefault();\n   118→        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n   119→          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n   120→        }\n   121→        break;\n   122→      case \"Escape\":\n   123→        setOpen(false);\n   124→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n   125→        break;\n   126→    }\n   127→  };\n   128→\n   129→  // Scroll active option into view\n   130→  useEffect(() => {\n   131→    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n   132→      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n   133→      if (activeEl) {\n   134→        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n   135→      }\n   136→    }\n   137→  }, [activeIndex]);\n   138→\n   139→  const activeDescendant =\n   140→    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n   141→      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n   142→      : undefined;\n   143→\n   144→  return (\n   145→    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n   146→      <input\n   147→        type=\"text\"\n   148→        className=\"input-field\"\n   149→        value={query}\n   150→        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n   151→        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n   152→        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n   153→        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n   154→        role=\"combobox\"\n   155→        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n   156→        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n   157→        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   158→        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n   159→        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n   160→        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n   161→      />\n   162→      {loading && (\n   163→        <div\n   164→          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n   165→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   166→          role=\"status\"\n   167→          aria-live=\"polite\"\n   168→        >\n   169→          Searching...\n   170→        </div>\n   171→      )}\n   172→\n   173→      {searchError && !loading && (\n   174→        <div\n   175→          className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n   176→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-error, #dc2626)\" }}\n   177→          role=\"alert\"\n   178→        >\n   179→          Book search is unavailable. Please try again later.\n   180→        </div>\n   181→      )}\n   182→\n   183→      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n   184→        <div\n   185→          ref={listboxRef}\n   186→          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   187→          role=\"listbox\"\n   188→          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n   189→          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n   190→          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n   191→        >\n   192→          {results.map((book, index) => (\n   193→            <div\n   194→              key={book.key}\n   195→              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n   196→              role=\"option\"\n   197→              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n   198→              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n   199→              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n   200→              style={{\n   201→                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n   202→              }}\n   203→            >\n   204→              {book.cover_i ? menus on outside click\n    37→  useEffect(() => {\n    38→    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    39→      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n    40→        setMenuOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  // Close mobile menu on route change\n    48→  useEffect(() => {\n    49→    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    50→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    51→  }, [pathname]);\n    52→\n    53→  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    54→    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Listing {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  book_title: string;\n    10→  book_author: string;\n    11→  book_cover_url: string;\n    12→  language: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  requires_approval: number;\n    18→  platform_preference: string;\n    19→  member_count: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  created_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→export default function HomePage() {\n    25→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    26→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    27→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    28→\n    29→  // Search & filter state\n    30→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    31→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    32→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    33→  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n    34→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    35→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    36→\n    37→  // Pagination state\n    38→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n    39→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n    40→  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n    41→\n    42→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    43→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    44→\n    45→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    46→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n    47→      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n    48→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    49→      const controller = new AbortController();\n    50→      abortRef.current = controller;\n    51→\n    52→      setLoading(true);\n    53→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    54→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    55→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    56→      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n    57→      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n    58→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    59→      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n    60→\n    61→      const qs = params.toString();\n    62→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n    63→        .then((r) => {\n    64→          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n    65→          return r.json();\n    66→        })\n    67→        .then((data) => {\n    68→          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n    69→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    70→          if (data.pagination) {\n    71→            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n    72→            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n    73→          }\n    74→          setError(null);\n    75→          setLoading(false);\n    76→        })\n    77→        .catch((err) => {\n    78→          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n    79→          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n    80→          setLoading(false);\n    81→        });\n    82→    },\n    83→    []\n    84→  );\n    85→\n    86→  // Initial fetch\n    87→  useEffect(() => {\n    88→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n    89→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    90→\n    91→  // Cleanup debounce timer and in-flight request on unmount\n    92→  useEffect(() => {\n    93→    return () => {\n    94→      if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    95→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    96→    };\n    97→  }, []);\n    98→\n    99→  // Debounced search\n   100→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n   101→    setSearchQuery(value);\n   102→    setPage(1);\n   103→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n   104→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n   105→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   106→    }, 400);\n   107→  };\n   108→\n   109→  // Immediate filter changes\n   110→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n   111→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n   112→    setPage(1);\n   113→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   114→  };\n   115→\n   116→  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n   117→    setReadingPace(value);\n   118→    setPage(1);\n   119→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n   120→  };\n   121→\n   122→  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n   123→    setStartDateFrom(value);\n   124→    setPage(1);\n   125→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n   126→  };\n   127→\n   128→  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n   129→    setSort(value);\n   130→    setPage(1);\n   131→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   132→  };\n   133→\n   134→  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n   135→    setPage(newPage);\n   136→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n   137→    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n   138→  };\n   139→\n   140→  const clearFilters = () => {\n   141→    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n   142→    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n   143→    setReadingPace(\"\");\n   144→    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n   145→    setSort(\"newest\");\n   146→    setPage(1);\n   147→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n   148→  };\n   149→\n   150→  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n   151→\n   152→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   153→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   154→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   155→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   156→      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n   157→    };\n   158→    return labels[f] || f;\n   159→  };\n   160→\n   161→  return (\n   162→    <div>\n   163→      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n   164→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n   165→          Find your reading companion\n   166→        </h1>\n   167→        <p\n   168→          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n   169→          style={{\n   170→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   171→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   172→          }}\n   173→        >\n   174→          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n   175→          connect on Telegram to read together.\n   176→        </p>\n   177→      </div>\n   178→\n   179→      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n   180→      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n   181→        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n   182→          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n   183→            <input\n   184→              type=\"text\"\n   185→              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n   186→              value={searchQuery}\n   187→              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n   188→              className=\"input-field\"\n   189→              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n   190→            />\n   191→            <svg\n   192→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   193→              style={{\n   194→                position: \"absolute\",\n   195→                left: \"0.75rem\",\n   196→                top: \"50%\",\n   197→                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n   198→                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   199→                width: \"1.125rem\",\n   200→                height: \"1.125rem\",\n   201→                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n   202→              }}\n   203→              fill=\"none\"\n   204→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   205→              strokeWidth={2}\n   206→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   207→            >\n   208→              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n   209→              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n   210→            </svg>\n   211→          </div>\n   212→          <button\n   213→            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n   214→            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   215→            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n   216→            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n   217→            style={{\n   218→              display: \"flex\",\n   219→              alignItems: \"center\",\n   220→              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n   221→              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n   222→              position: \"relative\",\n   223→            }}\n   224→          >\n   225→            <svg\n   226→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   227→              width=\"16\"\n   228→              height=\"16\"\n   229→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   230→              fill=\"none\"\n   231→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   232→              strokeWidth={2}\n   233→            >\n   234→              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n   235→              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n   236→              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n   237→            </svg>\n   238→            Filters\n   239→            {hasActiveFilters && (\n   240→              <span\n   241→                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   242→                style={{\n   243→                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n   244→                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n   245→                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n   246→                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   247→                  position: \"absolute\",\n   248→                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n   249→                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n   250→                }}\n   251→              />\n   252→            )}\n   253→          </button>\n   254→        </div>\n   255→\n   256→        {/* Filter panel */}\n   257→        {filtersOpen && (\n   258→          <div\n   259→            id=\"filter-panel\"\n   260→            className=\"card mt-3\"\n   261→            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n   262→          >\n   263→            <div\n   264→              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n   265→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   266→            >\n   267→              <div>\n   268→                <label\n   269→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   270→                  style={{\n   271→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   272→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   273→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   274→                  }}\n   275→                >\n   276→                  Meeting format\n   277→                </label>\n   278→                <select\n   279→                  value={meetingFormat}\n   280→                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n   281→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   282→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   283→                >\n   284→                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n   285→                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n   286→                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n   287→                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n   288→                </select>\n   289→              </div>\n   290→\n   291→              <div>\n   292→                <label\n   293→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   294→                  style={{\n   295→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   296→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   297→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   298→                  }}\n   299→                >\n   300→                  Reading pace\n   301→                </label>\n   302→                <select\n   303→                  value={readingPace}\n   304→                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n   305→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   306→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   307→                >\n   308→                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n   309→                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n   310→                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n   311→                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n   312→                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n   313→                </select>\n   314→              </div>\n   315→\n   316→              <div>\n   317→                <label\n   318→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   319→                  style={{\n   320→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   321→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   322→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   323→                  }}\n   324→                >\n   325→                  Starting from\n   326→                </label>\n   327→                <input\n   328→                  type=\"date\"\n   329→                  value={startDateFrom}\n   330→                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n   331→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   332→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   333→                />\n   334→              </div>\n   335→\n   336→              <div>\n   337→                <label\n   338→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   339→                  style={{\n   340→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   341→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   342→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   343→                  }}\n   344→                >\n   345→                  Sort by\n   346→                </label>\n   347→                <select\n   348→                  value={sort}\n   349→                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n   350→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   351→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   352→                >\n   353→                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n   354→                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n   355→                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n   356→                </select>\n   357→              </div>\n   358→\n   359→              {hasActiveFilters && (\n   360→                <button\n   361→                  onClick={clearFilters}\n   362→                  style={{\n   363→                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   364→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   365→                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   366→                    fontWeight: 600,\n   367→                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n   368→                    background: \"none\",\n   369→                    border: \"none\",\n   370→                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n   371→                  }}\n   372→                >\n   373→                  Clear all\n   374→                </button>\n   375→              )}\n   376→            </div>\n   377→          </div>\n   378→        )}\n   379→      </div>\n   380→\n   381→      {/* Results */}\n   382→      {loading ? (\n   383→        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n   384→          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n   385→            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n   386→              <div\n   387→                className=\"skeleton\"\n   388→                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n   389→              />\n   390→              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n   391→                <div\n   392→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n   393→                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n   394→                />\n   395→                <div\n   396→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n   397→                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n   398→                />\n   399→                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n   400→                  <div\n   401→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   402→                    style={{\n   403→                      width: \"5rem\",\n   404→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   405→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   406→                    }}\n   407→                  />\n   408→                  <div\n   409→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   410→                    style={{\n   411→                      width: \"4rem\",\n   412→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   413→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   414→                    }}\n   415→                  />\n   416→                  <div\n   417→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   418→                    style={{\n   419→                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n   420→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   421→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   422→                    }}\n   423→                  />\n   424→                </div>\n   425→              </div>\n   426→            </div>\n   427→          ))}\n   428→        </div>\n   429→      ) : error ? (\n   430→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   431→          <svg\n   432→            width=\"40\"\n   433→            height=\"40\"\n   434→            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   435→            fill=\"none\"\n   436→            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n   437→            strokeWidth={1.5}\n   438→            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n   439→          >\n   440→            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n   441→            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n   442→            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n   443→          </svg>\n   444→          <p\n   445→            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   446→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   447→          >\n   448→            {error}\n   449→          </p>\n   450→          <button\n   451→            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n   452→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n   453→            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n   454→          >\n   455→            Try again\n   456→          </button>\n   457→        </div>\n   458→      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n   459→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   460→          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n   461→            <>\n   462→              <p\n   463→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   464→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   465→              >\n   466→                No matching reading groups\n   467→              </p>\n   468→              <p\n   469→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   470→                style={{\n   471→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   472→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   473→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   474→                }}\n   475→              >\n   476→                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n   477→              </p>\n   478→              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n   479→                Clear filters\n   480→              </button>\n   481→            </>\n   482→          ) : (\n   483→            <>\n   484→              <p\n   485→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   486→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   487→              >\n   488→                No reading groups yet\n   489→              </p>\n   490→              <p\n   491→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   492→                style={{\n   493→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   494→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   495→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   496→                }}\n   497→              >\n   498→                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n   499→                companions.\n   500→              </p>\n   501→              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n   502→                Create the first listing\n   503→              </Link>\n   504→            </>\n   505→          )}\n   506→        </div>\n   507→      ) : (\n   508→        <>\n   509→          <p\n   510→            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n   511→            style={{\n   512→              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   513→              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   514→            }}\n   515→          >\n   516→            {totalResults} open group{totalResults !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n   517→            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n   518→            {totalPages > 1 ? ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n   519→          </p>\n   520→          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n   521→            {listings.map((listing) => (\n   522→              <Link\n   523→                key={listing.id}\n   524→                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n   525→                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n   526→                role=\"listitem\"\n   527→              >\n   528→                <BookCover\n   529→                  src={listing.book_cover_url}\n   530→                  alt={listing.book_title}\n   531→                  width={64}\n   532→                  height={96}\n   533→                  className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n   534→                  style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n   535→                />\n   536→\n   537→                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n   538→                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n   539→                    {listing.book_title}\n   540→                  </h3>\n   541→                  <p\n   542→                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n   543→                    style={{\n   544→                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   545→                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   546→                    }}\n   547→                  >\n   548→                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n   549→                  </p>\n   550→\n   551→                  <div\n   552→                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n   553→                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   554→                  >\n   555→                    <span\n   556→                      className=\"badge\"\n   557→                      style={{\n   558→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n   559→                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   560→                      }}\n   561→                    >\n   562→                      {listing.reading_pace}\n   563→                    </span>\n   564→                    <span\n   565→                      className=\"badge\"\n   566→                      style={{\n   567→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n   568→                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n   569→                      }}\n   570→                    >\n   571→                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n   572→                    </span>\n   573→                    <span\n   574→                      className=\"badge\"\n   575→                      style={{\n   576→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n   577→                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   578→                      }}\n   579→                    >\n   580→                      Starts{\" \"}\n   581→                      {new Date(listing.start_date + \"T00:00:00\").toLocaleDateString(\n   582→                        \"en-US\",\n   583→                        {\n   584→                          month: \"short\",\n   585→                          day: \"numeric\",\n   586→                        }\n   587→                      )}\n   588→                    </span>\n   589→                    <span\n   590→                      className=\"badge\"\n   591→                      style={{\n   592→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n   593→                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   594→                      }}\n   595→                    >\n   596→                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n   597→                    </span>\n   598→                    {listing.requires_approval ? (\n   599→                      <span\n   600→                        className=\"badge\"\n   601→                        style={{\n   602→                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n   603→                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   604→                        }}\n   605→                      >\n   606→                        Approval required\n   607→                      </span>\n   608→                    ) : null}\n   609→                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? 242, 0.08)\",\n   614→                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n   615→                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n   616→                          alignItems: \"center\",\n   617→ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HmN8cAuH2tbfo9eqiSyTiT","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→const isConfigured =\n     4→  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n     5→  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n     6→  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n     7→\n     8→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n     9→\n    10→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    11→  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n    12→  if (!transporter) {\n    13→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    14→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    15→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    16→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    17→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    18→        ? {\n    19→            auth: {\n    20→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    21→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    22→            },\n    23→          }\n    24→        : {}),\n    25→    });\n    26→  }\n    27→  return transporter;\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→export async function sendEmail(\n    31→  to: string,\n    32→  subject: string,\n    33→  text: string,\n    34→  html?: string\n    35→): Promise<boolean> {\n    36→  const t = getTransporter();\n    37→  if (!t) return false;\n    38→\n    39→  try {\n    40→    await t.sendMail({\n    41→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    42→      to,\n    43→      subject,\n    44→      text,\n    45→      html: html || text,\n    46→    });\n    47→    return true;\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    50→    return false;\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    55→  return isConfigured;\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"d5572703-261d-42c4-96fd-a0c1ecbdade2","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:02:01.762Z"}

comment: string }> = {};\n   137→        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n   138→        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n   139→        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n   140→          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n   141→          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n   142→          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n   143→        }\n   144→        setGivenRatings(given);\n   145→        setRatingScores(scores);\n   146→        setRatingComments(comments);\n   147→      }\n   148→    } catch {\n   149→      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n   150→    }\n   151→  }, [id]);\n   152→\n   153→  useEffect(() => {\n   154→    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n   155→      fetchRatings();\n   156→    }\n   157→  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n   158→\n   159→  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n   160→    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n   161→    if (!score) return;\n   162→    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n   163→    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n   164→    try {\n   165→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n   166→        method: \"POST\",\n   167→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   168→        body: JSON.stringify({\n   169→          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n   170→          ratedUserId: memberId,\n   171→          score,\n   172→          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n   173→        }),\n   174→      });\n   175→      const data = await res.json();\n   176→      if (!res.ok) {\n   177→        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n   178→      } else {\n   179→        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01EySD8i5xKoQs3aKjboULZj","session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"8f3f1fed-1842-4548-ab49-9c6ea966b7b5","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:02:05.835Z"}
