{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FzpkEhYyz2odzUoUuQWqvd","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n    30→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    42→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Check if already a member\n    46→  const existing = db\n    47→    .prepare(\n    48→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    )\n    50→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    51→\n    52→  if (existing) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n    57→  const pendingApp = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    60→    )\n    61→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    62→\n    63→  if (pendingApp) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n    71→  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n    72→  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    73→    const freshListing = db\n    74→      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→    if (!freshListing) {\n    78→      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    79→    }\n    80→\n    81→    const { count } = db\n    82→      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    83→      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    84→\n    85→    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    86→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    db.prepare(\n    90→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    91→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    92→\n    93→    const newCount = count + 1;\n    94→    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    95→      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    96→    }\n    97→\n    98→    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    99→  });\n   100→\n   101→  const result = joinTransaction();\n   102→\n   103→  if (result.error) {\n   104→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n   105→  }\n   106→\n   107→  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   108→  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n   109→  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n   110→  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n   111→    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   112→  } else {\n   113→    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   114→  }\n   115→\n   116→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n   117→}\n   118→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"cd5fb50e-5681-48af-8dbe-b8048acde2cf","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:03:49.388Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n  const pendingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (pendingApp) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const freshListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!freshListing) {\n      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    }\n\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  } else {\n    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","numLines":118,"startLine":1,"totalLines":118}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GLGK1RXe3Qt5RDcWYqxspy","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n    48→  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    49→    // Check if already a member\n    50→    const isMember = db\n    51→      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    52→      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    53→\n    54→    if (isMember) {\n    55→      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    59→    const currentListing = db\n    60→      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    61→      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n    62→\n    63→    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n    64→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    68→    const existingApp = db\n    69→      .prepare(\n    70→        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    71→      )\n    72→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→    if (existingApp) {\n    75→      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n    76→        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n    77→      }\n    78→      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n    79→        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n    80→      }\n    81→      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    82→      db.prepare(\n    83→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    84→      ).run(existingApp.id);\n    85→\n    86→      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    // Insert new application\n    90→    db.prepare(\n    91→      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    92→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    93→\n    94→    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    95→  });\n    96→\n    97→  const result = applyTransaction();\n    98→\n    99→  if (result.error) {\n   100→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   104→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   105→\n   106→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   107→}\n   108→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"d45525fa-ff3a-43f1-b17a-0329eb35207c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:03:49.469Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    // Check if already a member\n    const isMember = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    if (isMember) {\n      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    }\n\n    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    const currentListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    }\n\n    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    const existingApp = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n\n    if (existingApp) {\n      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n      }\n      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n      }\n      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(existingApp.id);\n\n      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    }\n\n    // Insert new application\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n  });\n\n  const result = applyTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":108,"startLine":1,"totalLines":108}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NG8rvcgHqGmpHvDY3bjqHh","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off\n    77→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    78→  if (isAuthor) {\n    79→    pendingApplicants = db\n    80→      .prepare(\n    81→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    82→         FROM listing_applications la\n    83→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    84→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    85→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    86→      )\n    87→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n    91→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    92→  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n    93→  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n    94→  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n    95→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    96→    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    97→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    98→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  return NextResponse.json({\n   102→    listing: {\n   103→      ...safeListingData,\n   104→      members,\n   105→      memberCount: members.length,\n   106→      isMember,\n   107→      isAuthor,\n   108→      hasApplied,\n   109→      applicationStatus,\n   110→      pendingApplicants,\n   111→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   112→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   113→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→\n   118→export async function PATCH(\n   119→  req: NextRequest,\n   120→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   121→) {\n   122→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   123→  if (!session) {\n   124→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   125→  }\n   126→\n   127→  const { id } = await params;\n   128→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   129→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   130→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   131→  }\n   132→\n   133→  const listing = db\n   134→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   135→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   136→\n   137→  if (!listing) {\n   138→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   143→  }\n   144→\n   145→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   146→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   147→    return NextResponse.json(\n   148→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   149→      { status: 400 }\n   150→    );\n   151→  }\n   152→\n   153→  try {\n   154→    const body = await req.json();\n   155→    const {\n   156→      language,\n   157→      readingPace,\n   158→      startDate,\n   159→      meetingFormat,\n   160→      maxGroupSize,\n   161→      requiresApproval,\n   162→      platformPreference,\n   163→    } = body;\n   164→\n   165→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   166→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   167→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→    }\n   169→\n   170→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   171→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   172→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   173→      }\n   174→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   175→      if (startDate < today) {\n   176→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→      }\n   178→    }\n   179→\n   180→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   181→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   182→    }\n   183→\n   184→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   185→      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n   186→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n   187→      }\n   188→      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   189→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   190→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   191→      }\n   192→\n   193→      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n   194→      const memberCount = (db\n   195→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   196→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   197→\n   198→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   199→        return NextResponse.json(\n   200→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   201→          { status: 400 }\n   202→        );\n   203→      }\n   204→    }\n   205→\n   206→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   207→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   211→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   212→    }\n   213→\n   214→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   215→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   216→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   217→\n   218→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   220→      values.push(language);\n   221→    }\n   222→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   223→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   224→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   225→    }\n   226→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   227→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   228→      values.push(startDate);\n   229→    }\n   230→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   231→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   233→    }\n   234→    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n   235→    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n   236→    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n   237→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   238→      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   239→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   240→      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n   241→      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n   242→    }\n   243→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   244→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   245→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   246→    }\n   247→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   248→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   249→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   250→    }\n   251→\n   252→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   253→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   254→    }\n   255→\n   256→    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n   257→    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n   258→\n   259→    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n   260→    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n   261→    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   262→      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n   263→      const txValues = [...values];\n   264→\n   265→      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n   266→        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n   267→        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n   268→        const currentMemberCount = (db\n   269→          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   270→          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   271→\n   272→        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n   273→          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n   274→        }\n   275→\n   276→        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n   277→          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n   278→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   279→          txValues.push(1);\n   280→        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n   281→          // Group has room now — reopen it\n   282→          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   283→          txValues.push(0);\n   284→        }\n   285→      }\n   286→\n   287→      txValues.push(listingId);\n   288→      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n   289→\n   290→      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n   291→      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n   292→      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n   293→        db.prepare(\n   294→          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   295→        ).run(listingId);\n   296→      }\n   297→\n   298→      return null;\n   299→    });\n   300→\n   301→    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n   302→    if (txResult?.error) {\n   303→      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n   304→    }\n   305→\n   306→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   307→  } catch (error) {\n   308→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   309→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   310→  }\n   311→}\n   312→\n   313→export async function DELETE(\n   314→  _req: NextRequest,\n   315→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   316→) {\n   317→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   318→  if (!session) {\n   319→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   320→  }\n   321→\n   322→  const { id } = await params;\n   323→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   324→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   325→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   326→  }\n   327→\n   328→  const listing = db\n   329→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   330→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   331→\n   332→  if (!listing) {\n   333→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   334→  }\n   335→\n   336→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   337→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   338→  }\n   339→\n   340→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   341→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   342→    return NextResponse.json(\n   343→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   344→      { status: 400 }\n   345→    );\n   346→  }\n   347→\n   348→  try {\n   349→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   350→    const members = db\n   351→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   352→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   353→\n   354→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   355→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   356→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   357→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   358→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   359→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   360→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   361→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   362→    });\n   363→\n   364→    deleteTransaction();\n   365→\n   366→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   367→    for (const member of members) {\n   368→      try {\n   369→        createNotification(\n   370→          member.user_id,\n   371→          null,\n   372→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   373→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   374→        );\n   375→      } catch {\n   376→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   377→      }\n   378→    }\n   379→\n   380→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   381→  } catch (error) {\n   382→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   383→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   384→  }\n   385→}\n   386→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"a2e753ca-4bcb-4e52-a8a3-3a5b660b4535","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:03:50.104Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(1);\n        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group has room now — reopen it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      txValues.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n\n      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n        db.prepare(\n          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n        ).run(listingId);\n      }\n\n      return null;\n    });\n\n    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n    if (txResult?.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":386,"startLine":1,"totalLines":386}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_014TpLd2SnM4cocYeZ1U7Wc8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01T6KBbGpaMdRKTGsYM9dUPR","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts","old_string":"const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n}","new_string":"/**\n * Read bot token live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n */\nfunction getBotToken(): string {\n  return process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n}\n\nfunction getTelegramApi(): string {\n  return `https://api.telegram.org/bot${getBotToken()}`;\n}\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return getBotToken().length > 0;\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":319,"cache_read_input_tokens":43675,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":319},"output_tokens":3,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"4088a33b-01c6-435d-bd6f-f83123f2d87c"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":2,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"file_pat"}},"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"0b159133-7f0d-4d83-8dcc-7125a92a8b7f"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01T6KBbGpaMdRKTGsYM9dUPR","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"085c7c31-471f-4fc0-b7aa-e7f28bb6700c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:08.882Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts","oldString":"const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n}","newString":"/**\n * Read bot token live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n */\nfunction getBotToken(): string {\n  return process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n}\n\nfunction getTelegramApi(): string {\n  return `https://api.telegram.org/bot${getBotToken()}`;\n}\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return getBotToken().length > 0;\n}","originalFile":"/**\n * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n *\n * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n */\n\nconst BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  method: string,\n  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    method: \"POST\",\n    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n  });\n  return res.json();\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot info (username, id).\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: number;\n  username: string;\n  first_name: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{\n    id: number;\n    username: string;\n    first_name: string;\n  }>(\"getMe\");\n  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n *\n * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n *\n * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n */\nexport async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n  listingId: number\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!bot) return null;\n  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n */\nexport async function createChatInviteLink(\n  chatId: number | string\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    {\n      chat_id: chatId,\n      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n      creates_join_request: false,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    return res.result.invite_link;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n */\nexport async function exportChatInviteLink(\n  chatId: number | string\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n  });\n  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    return res.result;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n */\nexport function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage(\n  chatId: number | string,\n  text: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n    text,\n    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n */\nexport async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n    url,\n    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n  payload: string\n): number | null {\n  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":13,"oldLines":11,"newStart":13,"newLines":21,"lines":["  * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing","  */"," ","-const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";","-const TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;","+/**","+ * Read bot token live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.","+ * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,","+ * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.","+ */","+function getBotToken(): string {","+  return process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";","+}"," ","+function getTelegramApi(): string {","+  return `https://api.telegram.org/bot${getBotToken()}`;","+}","+"," export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {","-  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;","+  return getBotToken().length > 0;"," }"," "," /**"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QWZJ17ggNyJ6c4myLYuvD8","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"09d1e524-e6ac-455a-8dc2-06ec74f1d2d4","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:10.225Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts","oldString":"  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {","newString":"  const res = await fetch(`${getTelegramApi()}/${method}`, {","originalFile":"/**\n * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n *\n * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n */\n\n/**\n * Read bot token live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n */\nfunction getBotToken(): string {\n  return process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n}\n\nfunction getTelegramApi(): string {\n  return `https://api.telegram.org/bot${getBotToken()}`;\n}\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return getBotToken().length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  method: string,\n  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    method: \"POST\",\n    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n  });\n  return res.json();\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot info (username, id).\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: number;\n  username: string;\n  first_name: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{\n    id: number;\n    username: string;\n    first_name: string;\n  }>(\"getMe\");\n  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n *\n * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n *\n * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n */\nexport async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n  listingId: number\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!bot) return null;\n  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n */\nexport async function createChatInviteLink(\n  chatId: number | string\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    {\n      chat_id: chatId,\n      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n      creates_join_request: false,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    return res.result.invite_link;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n */\nexport async function exportChatInviteLink(\n  chatId: number | string\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n  });\n  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    return res.result;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n */\nexport function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage(\n  chatId: number | string,\n  text: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n    text,\n    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n */\nexport async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n    url,\n    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n  payload: string\n): number | null {\n  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":37,"oldLines":7,"newStart":37,"newLines":7,"lines":["   method: string,","   params?: Record<string, unknown>"," ): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {","-  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {","+  const res = await fetch(`${getTelegramApi()}/${method}`, {","     method: \"POST\",","     headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },","     body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_014TpLd2SnM4cocYeZ1U7Wc8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_019sCLssvdkbCXgQDH6SK8pU","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts","old_string":"const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\nconst DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}","new_string":"const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\n/**\n * Read bot credentials live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n */\nfunction getBotToken(): string {\n  return process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n}\n\nfunction getClientId(): string {\n  return process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n}\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return getBotToken().length > 0 && getClientId().length > 0;\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":319,"cache_read_input_tokens":43675,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":319},"output_tokens":3,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"4ac403d9-769f-449f-a06e-5d830fa89943"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":4,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"file_path"}},"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"7ae39e49-a9a4-446d-9e5f-cf96255ca669"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019sCLssvdkbCXgQDH6SK8pU","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"25b70535-c3f5-4f80-ab1e-1849bb161776","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:12.959Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts","oldString":"const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\nconst DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}","newString":"const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\n/**\n * Read bot credentials live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n */\nfunction getBotToken(): string {\n  return process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n}\n\nfunction getClientId(): string {\n  return process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n}\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return getBotToken().length > 0 && getClientId().length > 0;\n}","originalFile":"/**\n * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n *\n * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n * - Author adds bot to their server\n * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n */\n\nconst BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\nconst DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n */\nexport function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Discord REST API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  endpoint: string,\n  method: string = \"GET\",\n  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n      method,\n      headers: {\n        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      },\n      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    });\n\n    if (!res.ok) {\n      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n      return {\n        ok: false,\n        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n      };\n    }\n\n    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    return { ok: true, data };\n  } catch (err) {\n    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot user info.\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: string;\n  username: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n *\n * Permission bits:\n * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n * Total: 3089\n */\nexport function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n  const permissions = 3089;\n  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create a text channel in a guild.\n */\nexport async function createTextChannel(\n  guildId: string,\n  name: string,\n  topic?: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n    }\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite for a channel.\n */\nexport async function createChannelInvite(\n  channelId: string,\n  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      max_age: maxAge,\n      max_uses: 0,\n      unique: true,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n */\nexport async function sendChannelMessage(\n  channelId: string,\n  content: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n    \"POST\",\n    { content }\n  );\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get guild (server) info.\n */\nexport async function getGuild(\n  guildId: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n */\nexport async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n  { id: string; name: string }[]\n> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":13,"oldLines":12,"newStart":13,"newLines":23,"lines":["  * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing","  */"," ","-const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";","-const CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";"," const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";"," ","+/**","+ * Read bot credentials live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.","+ * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,","+ * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.","+ */","+function getBotToken(): string {","+  return process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";","+}","+","+function getClientId(): string {","+  return process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";","+}","+"," export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {","-  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;","+  return getBotToken().length > 0 && getClientId().length > 0;"," }"," "," /**"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":319,"cache_read_input_tokens":43675,"output_tokens":972},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"91cddd81-239b-403c-8800-f7e24b0bbe9e"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AjfrjkPJFek6q4TXg9iEji","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"b0d6c9c6-2996-4316-84bb-2d701386465b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:14.725Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts","oldString":"  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;","newString":"  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${getClientId()}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;","originalFile":"/**\n * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n *\n * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n * - Author adds bot to their server\n * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n */\n\nconst DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\n/**\n * Read bot credentials live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n */\nfunction getBotToken(): string {\n  return process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n}\n\nfunction getClientId(): string {\n  return process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n}\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return getBotToken().length > 0 && getClientId().length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n */\nexport function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Discord REST API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  endpoint: string,\n  method: string = \"GET\",\n  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n      method,\n      headers: {\n        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      },\n      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    });\n\n    if (!res.ok) {\n      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n      return {\n        ok: false,\n        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n      };\n    }\n\n    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    return { ok: true, data };\n  } catch (err) {\n    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot user info.\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: string;\n  username: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n *\n * Permission bits:\n * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n * Total: 3089\n */\nexport function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n  const permissions = 3089;\n  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create a text channel in a guild.\n */\nexport async function createTextChannel(\n  guildId: string,\n  name: string,\n  topic?: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n    }\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite for a channel.\n */\nexport async function createChannelInvite(\n  channelId: string,\n  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      max_age: maxAge,\n      max_uses: 0,\n      unique: true,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n */\nexport async function sendChannelMessage(\n  channelId: string,\n  content: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n    \"POST\",\n    { content }\n  );\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get guild (server) info.\n */\nexport async function getGuild(\n  guildId: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n */\nexport async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n  { id: string; name: string }[]\n> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":98,"oldLines":7,"newStart":98,"newLines":7,"lines":[" export function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {","   const permissions = 3089;","   const state = `listing_${listingId}`;","-  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;","+  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${getClientId()}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;"," }"," "," /**"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
