{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01DGpj7E5jRT5B2PiznXtbRw","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FHxo8QBGHhQzJdisbq78XE","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts","old_string":"      Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,","new_string":"      Authorization: `Bot ${getBotToken()}`,"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1341,"cache_read_input_tokens":43994,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1341},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"cd264223-ae36-47c8-9b57-69fdaebaf2f6"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FHxo8QBGHhQzJdisbq78XE","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"aee6128f-7c62-4314-99fb-be8345cc7983","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:19.217Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts","oldString":"      Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,","newString":"      Authorization: `Bot ${getBotToken()}`,","originalFile":"/**\n * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n *\n * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n * - Author adds bot to their server\n * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n */\n\nconst DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\n/**\n * Read bot credentials live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n */\nfunction getBotToken(): string {\n  return process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n}\n\nfunction getClientId(): string {\n  return process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n}\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return getBotToken().length > 0 && getClientId().length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n */\nexport function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Discord REST API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  endpoint: string,\n  method: string = \"GET\",\n  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n      method,\n      headers: {\n        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      },\n      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    });\n\n    if (!res.ok) {\n      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n      return {\n        ok: false,\n        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n      };\n    }\n\n    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    return { ok: true, data };\n  } catch (err) {\n    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot user info.\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: string;\n  username: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n *\n * Permission bits:\n * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n * Total: 3089\n */\nexport function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n  const permissions = 3089;\n  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${getClientId()}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create a text channel in a guild.\n */\nexport async function createTextChannel(\n  guildId: string,\n  name: string,\n  topic?: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n    }\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite for a channel.\n */\nexport async function createChannelInvite(\n  channelId: string,\n  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      max_age: maxAge,\n      max_uses: 0,\n      unique: true,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n */\nexport async function sendChannelMessage(\n  channelId: string,\n  content: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n    \"POST\",\n    { content }\n  );\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get guild (server) info.\n */\nexport async function getGuild(\n  guildId: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n */\nexport async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n  { id: string; name: string }[]\n> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":52,"oldLines":7,"newStart":52,"newLines":7,"lines":["     const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {","       method,","       headers: {","-        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,","+        Authorization: `Bot ${getBotToken()}`,","         \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",","       },","       body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

userId?: number;\n  email?: string;\n  displayName?: string;\n}","originalFile":"import { getIronSession, type SessionOptions } from \"iron-session\";\nimport { cookies } from \"next/headers\";\n\nexport interface SessionData {\n  userId?: number;\n  email?: string;\n  displayName?: string;\n}\n\nconst DEV_SECRET =\n  \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\";\n\nfunction getSessionOptions(): SessionOptions {\n  const secret = process.env.SESSION_SECRET;\n  if (!secret && process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\") {\n    throw new Error(\n      \"SESSION_SECRET environment variable is required in production\"\n    );\n  }\n  return {\n    password: secret || DEV_SECRET,\n    cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",\n    cookieOptions: {\n      httpOnly: true,\n      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\" && process.env.HTTPS_ENABLED === \"true\",\n      sameSite: \"lax\",\n      maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, // 1 week\n    },\n  };\n}\n\nexport async function getSession() {\n  const cookieStore = await cookies();\n  return getIronSession<SessionData>(cookieStore, getSessionOptions());\n}\n\nexport async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  return session;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":5,"newStart":1,"newLines":6,"lines":[" import { getIronSession, type SessionOptions } from \"iron-session\";"," import { cookies } {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01KV3RM2eNHESQNAxgm4XFyt","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01XzPR8dL2rFrfwkBSY6MkTg","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/session.ts","old_string":"export async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  return session;\n}","new_string":"export async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  // Verify the user still exists in the DB — a deleted user's cookie\n  // would otherwise grant full access until the session expires\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(session.userId) as { id: number; display_name: string } | undefined;\n  if (!user) {\n    session.destroy();\n    return null;\n  }\n  // Keep session displayName in sync with DB (handles stale cookies)\n  if (user.display_name !== session.displayName) {\n    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    await session.save();\n  }\n  return session;\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":203,"cache_read_input_tokens":45335,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":203},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"2da41724-2619-426a-b4c0-c381f72f93c3"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XzPR8dL2rFrfwkBSY6MkTg","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/session.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"03fab2f2-d301-426e-af13-35e18d0bbb76","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:28.293Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/session.ts","oldString":"export async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  return session;\n}","newString":"export async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  // Verify the user still exists in the DB — a deleted user's cookie\n  // would otherwise grant full access until the session expires\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(session.userId) as { id: number; display_name: string } | undefined;\n  if (!user) {\n    session.destroy();\n    return null;\n  }\n  // Keep session displayName in sync with DB (handles stale cookies)\n  if (user.display_name !== session.displayName) {\n    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    await session.save();\n  }\n  return session;\n}","originalFile":"import { getIronSession, type SessionOptions } from \"iron-session\";\nimport { cookies } from \"next/headers\";\nimport db from \"./db\";\n\nexport interface SessionData {\n  userId?: number;\n  email?: string;\n  displayName?: string;\n}\n\nconst DEV_SECRET =\n  \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\";\n\nfunction getSessionOptions(): SessionOptions {\n  const secret = process.env.SESSION_SECRET;\n  if (!secret && process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\") {\n    throw new Error(\n      \"SESSION_SECRET environment variable is required in production\"\n    );\n  }\n  return {\n    password: secret || DEV_SECRET,\n    cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",\n    cookieOptions: {\n      httpOnly: true,\n      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\" && process.env.HTTPS_ENABLED === \"true\",\n      sameSite: \"lax\",\n      maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, // 1 week\n    },\n  };\n}\n\nexport async function getSession() {\n  const cookieStore = await cookies();\n  return getIronSession<SessionData>(cookieStore, getSessionOptions());\n}\n\nexport async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  return session;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":40,"oldLines":5,"newStart":40,"newLines":19,"lines":["   if (!session.userId) {","     return null;","   }","+  // Verify the user still exists in the DB — a deleted user's cookie","+  // would otherwise grant full access until the session expires","+  const user = db","+    .prepare(\"SELECT id, display_name FROM users WHERE id = ?\")","+    .get(session.userId) as { id: number; display_name: string } | undefined;","+  if (!user) {","+    session.destroy();","+    return null;","+  }","+  // Keep session displayName in sync with DB (handles stale cookies)","+  if (user.display_name !== session.displayName) {","+    session.displayName = user.display_name;","+    await session.save();","+  }","   return session;"," }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01AwkeTiK1P4Pzf8v9e5MXGT","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01LAoLewhbcffxgdbxXfaMci","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","old_string":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}","new_string":"/**\n * Notify all members that the group is full.\n * Accepts listing data as parameters to avoid re-querying outside the\n * join transaction (which could return stale platform_preference if\n * a concurrent PATCH changed it between the transaction commit and this call).\n */\nexport function notifyGroupFull(\n  listingId: number,\n  bookTitle: string,\n  platformPreference: string\n) {\n  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const platform = platformPreference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n  const botConfigured = platformPreference === \"discord\"\n    ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n    : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n  const message = botConfigured\n    ? `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n    : `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"group_full\",\n      message\n    );\n  }\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":694,"cache_read_input_tokens":45538,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":694},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"51864e50-0724-4431-81bf-c797e6a0b9b7"}
{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_stop","index":1},"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"5d5767c6-22ff-42c1-8868-e90b16607d73"}
{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":694,"cache_read_input_tokens":45538,"output_tokens":837},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"6b110f11-063f-4579-b8dc-f2e2c0f0cdc4"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LAoLewhbcffxgdbxXfaMci","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"c8147dad-d5af-48c6-9150-652918b72c09","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:40.663Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}","newString":"/**\n * Notify all members that the group is full.\n * Accepts listing data as parameters to avoid re-querying outside the\n * join transaction (which could return stale platform_preference if\n * a concurrent PATCH changed it between the transaction commit and this call).\n */\nexport function notifyGroupFull(\n  listingId: number,\n  bookTitle: string,\n  platformPreference: string\n) {\n  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const platform = platformPreference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n  const botConfigured = platformPreference === \"discord\"\n    ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n    : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n  const message = botConfigured\n    ? `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n    : `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"group_full\",\n      message\n    );\n  }\n}","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\nimport { escapeHtmlForEmail } from \"./crypto-utils\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    // HTML-escape the message to prevent injection via user-controlled content\n    // (display names, book titles) embedded in notification messages\n    const htmlBody = `<p>${escapeHtmlForEmail(message)}</p>`;\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message, htmlBody).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    case \"telegram_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    case \"discord_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":118,"oldLines":31,"newStart":118,"newLines":36,"lines":["   }"," }"," ","-export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {","-  const listing = db","-    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","-    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;","+/**","+ * Notify all members that the group is full.","+ * Accepts listing data as parameters to avoid re-querying outside the","+ * join transaction (which could return stale platform_preference if","+ * a concurrent PATCH changed it between the transaction commit and this call).","+ */","+export function notifyGroupFull(","+  listingId: number,","+  bookTitle: string,","+  platformPreference: string","+) {","   // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat","   const members = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","     .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];"," ","-  if (listing) {","-    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";","-    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"","-      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN","-      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;","-    const message = botConfigured","-      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`","-      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;","+  const platform = platformPreference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";","+  const botConfigured = platformPreference === \"discord\"","+    ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN","+    : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;","+  const message = botConfigured","+    ? `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`","+    : `The reading group for \"${bookTitle}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;"," ","-    for (const member of members) {","-      createNotification(","-        member.user_id,","-        listingId,","-        \"group_full\",","-        message","-      );","-    }","+  for (const member of members) {","+    createNotification(","+      member.user_id,","+      listingId,","+      \"group_full\",","+      message","+    );","   }"," }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01XkZjFGNCmBZKtxKfMf9gBN","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014CzKpWQ9NKf4qYjnKdLznh","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","old_string":"  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  } else {\n    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n  }","new_string":"  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(\n      listingId,\n      listing.book_title as string,\n      listing.platform_preference as string\n    );\n  } else {\n    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":870,"cache_read_input_tokens":46232,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":870},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"8bca9845-4105-4c57-a378-2b4dd5a4ade7"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014CzKpWQ9NKf4qYjnKdLznh","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"85899482-f5ec-48f9-ad6f-1daf89348079","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:48.656Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","oldString":"  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  } else {\n    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n  }","newString":"  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(\n      listingId,\n      listing.book_title as string,\n      listing.platform_preference as string\n    );\n  } else {\n    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n  const pendingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (pendingApp) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const freshListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!freshListing) {\n      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    }\n\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author\n  // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  } else {\n    notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":108,"oldLines":7,"newStart":108,"newLines":11,"lines":["   // When group just filled, skip new_member notification for the author","   // since they'll receive the more important group_full notification instead","   if (result.count === result.maxSize) {","-    notifyGroupFull(listingId);","+    notifyGroupFull(","+      listingId,","+      listing.book_title as string,","+      listing.platform_preference as string","+    );","   } else {","     notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011UatkMvsr2zSbL9v7ADocm","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Re-read max_group_size inside transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n    63→      const freshListing = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n    66→\n    67→      if (!freshListing) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Listing not found\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Check if group is already full\n    72→      const { count } = db\n    73→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    74→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    75→\n    76→      if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    77→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    78→      }\n    79→\n    80→      // Update application status\n    81→      db.prepare(\n    82→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    83→      ).run(applicationId);\n    84→\n    85→      // Add to members\n    86→      db.prepare(\n    87→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    88→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    89→\n    90→      // Check if group is now full\n    91→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    92→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    93→      if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    94→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    95→\n    96→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    97→        rejectedApps = db\n    98→          .prepare(\n    99→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n   100→          )\n   101→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n   102→\n   103→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n   104→          db.prepare(\n   105→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   106→          ).run(app.id);\n   107→        }\n   108→\n   109→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   110→      }\n   111→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   112→    });\n   113→\n   114→    try {\n   115→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   116→\n   117→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   118→      try {\n   119→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   120→\n   121→        if (result.isFull) {\n   122→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   123→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   124→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   125→          }\n   126→        }\n   127→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   128→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   129→      }\n   130→\n   131→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   132→    } catch (err) {\n   133→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   134→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   135→    }\n   136→  } else {\n   137→    // Reject\n   138→    db.prepare(\n   139→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   140→    ).run(applicationId);"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"d38ef261-be44-4949-9397-1184b48483ca","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:55.155Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Re-read max_group_size inside transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n      const freshListing = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (!freshListing) {\n        throw new Error(\"Listing not found\");\n      }\n\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);","numLines":140,"startLine":1,"totalLines":147}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YRvbn7uREw3zVK8nFoCujk","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"e733812a-e940-4ff9-9cc9-ccc90fb8149a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:04:59.708Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","oldString":"        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {","newString":"        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(\n            listingId,\n            listing.book_title as string,\n            listing.platform_preference as string\n          );\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Re-read max_group_size inside transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n      const freshListing = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (!freshListing) {\n        throw new Error(\"Listing not found\");\n      }\n\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":119,"oldLines":7,"newStart":119,"newLines":11,"lines":["         notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");"," ","         if (result.isFull) {","-          notifyGroupFull(listingId);","+          notifyGroupFull(","+            listingId,","+            listing.book_title as string,","+            listing.platform_preference as string","+          );","           for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {","             notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");","           }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01P1dWgbpSYXK8bTg4AxmkCV","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01YN9EwiFgHzHm4E1v4LvELw","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {","new_string":"    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Re-check platform links inside the transaction to prevent TOCTOU race:\n      // a concurrent POST to /telegram or /discord could set a link between the\n      // outer guard (line 146) and this point\n      const current = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link, discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string | null; discord_link: string | null } | undefined;\n      if (current?.telegram_link || current?.discord_link) {\n        return { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" };\n      }\n\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":271,"cache_read_input_tokens":50379,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":271},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"8bbe80c9-332f-4b85-890a-dcbb8505264f"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":271,"cache_read_input_tokens":50379,"output_tokens":466},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"4891ce3b-aab8-4cc0-8d44-f9ca2309f367"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YN9EwiFgHzHm4E1v4LvELw","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"9836ba55-cb36-4ef2-ae08-cd6336e7706e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:05:11.696Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {","newString":"    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Re-check platform links inside the transaction to prevent TOCTOU race:\n      // a concurrent POST to /telegram or /discord could set a link between the\n      // outer guard (line 146) and this point\n      const current = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link, discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string | null; discord_link: string | null } | undefined;\n      if (current?.telegram_link || current?.discord_link) {\n        return { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" };\n      }\n\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  // Show regardless of requires_approval — pending apps can exist after the flag is toggled off\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Check if requires_approval is being toggled off — need to handle orphaned pending apps\n    const togglingApprovalOff = requiresApproval === false && listing.requires_approval;\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      const txUpdates = [...updates];\n      const txValues = [...values];\n\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize === currentMemberCount && !fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group is now exactly full — mark it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(1);\n        } else if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          // Group has room now — reopen it\n          txUpdates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          txValues.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      txValues.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${txUpdates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...txValues);\n\n      // When requires_approval is toggled off, auto-reject orphaned pending applications\n      // so those users can join directly instead of being stuck in limbo\n      if (togglingApprovalOff) {\n        db.prepare(\n          \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n        ).run(listingId);\n      }\n\n      return null;\n    });\n\n    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n    if (txResult?.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":259,"oldLines":6,"newStart":259,"newLines":16,"lines":["     // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins","     // Use local copies of updates/values inside the transaction to avoid mutating outer arrays","     const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {","+      // Re-check platform links inside the transaction to prevent TOCTOU race:","+      // a concurrent POST to /telegram or /discord could set a link between the","+      // outer guard (line 146) and this point","+      const current = db","+        .prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link, discord_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","+        .get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string | null; discord_link: string | null } | undefined;","+      if (current?.telegram_link || current?.discord_link) {","+        return { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" };","+      }","+","       const txUpdates = [...updates];","       const txValues = [...values];"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be a string\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n  if (bio !== undefined && typeof bio !== \"string\") {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be a string\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n\n  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    displayName.trim(),\n    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    session.userId\n  );\n\n  // Update session\n  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n  await session.save();\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":10,"oldLines":6,"newStart":10,"newLines":14,"lines":[" ","   const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();"," ","+  // Type-check before string operations to prevent TypeError on non-string input","+  if (typeof displayName !== \"string\") {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be a string\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }","+  if (bio !== undefined && typeof bio !== \"string\") {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be a string\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }","+","   if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {","     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_014QdA9Mi5ZgZVk3tcy2xYY2","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G8JkVbSqsCD8dwPm3TdhRh","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/email.ts","old_string":"import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n\nconst isConfigured =\n  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n\nlet transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n\nfunction getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n  if (!isConfigured) return null;","new_string":"import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n\n/**\n * Check SMTP config live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * permanently returning false if SMTP vars aren't set at that exact moment.\n */\nfunction checkConfigured(): boolean {\n  return (\n    !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n    !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n    !!process.env.SMTP_FROM\n  );\n}\n\nlet transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n\nfunction getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n  if (!checkConfigured()) return null;"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":396,"cache_read_input_tokens":51156,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":396},"output_tokens":7,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"80637cce-839e-47db-8270-89392dc132ef"}
