{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01G8JkVbSqsCD8dwPm3TdhRh","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/email.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"a075ca69-3c62-4ab9-b273-cb5137895f8a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:05:26.293Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/email.ts","oldString":"import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n\nconst isConfigured =\n  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n\nlet transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n\nfunction getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n  if (!isConfigured) return null;","newString":"import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n\n/**\n * Check SMTP config live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * permanently returning false if SMTP vars aren't set at that exact moment.\n */\nfunction checkConfigured(): boolean {\n  return (\n    !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n    !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n    !!process.env.SMTP_FROM\n  );\n}\n\nlet transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n\nfunction getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n  if (!checkConfigured()) return null;","originalFile":"import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n\nconst isConfigured =\n  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n\nlet transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n\nfunction getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n  if (!transporter) {\n    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n        ? {\n            auth: {\n              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n            },\n          }\n        : {}),\n    });\n  }\n  return transporter;\n}\n\nexport async function sendEmail(\n  to: string,\n  subject: string,\n  text: string,\n  html?: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const t = getTransporter();\n  if (!t) return false;\n\n  try {\n    await t.sendMail({\n      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n      to,\n      subject,\n      text,\n      html: html || text,\n    });\n    return true;\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n  return isConfigured;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":14,"newStart":1,"newLines":22,"lines":[" import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";"," ","-const isConfigured =","-  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&","-  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&","-  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;","+/**","+ * Check SMTP config live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.","+ * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,","+ * permanently returning false if SMTP vars aren't set at that exact moment.","+ */","+function checkConfigured(): boolean {","+  return (","+    !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&","+    !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&","+    !!process.env.SMTP_FROM","+  );","+}"," "," let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;"," "," function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {","-  if (!isConfigured) return null;","+  if (!checkConfigured()) return null;","   if (!transporter) {","     transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({","       host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MGfCQ6nGEnqY4EH9kBhWz5","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/email.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"1442868f-e75b-4afd-bd5f-0bbe9996ae4d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:05:27.380Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/email.ts","oldString":"export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n  return isConfigured;\n}","newString":"export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n  return checkConfigured();\n}","originalFile":"import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n\n/**\n * Check SMTP config live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n * permanently returning false if SMTP vars aren't set at that exact moment.\n */\nfunction checkConfigured(): boolean {\n  return (\n    !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n    !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n    !!process.env.SMTP_FROM\n  );\n}\n\nlet transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n\nfunction getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n  if (!checkConfigured()) return null;\n  if (!transporter) {\n    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n        ? {\n            auth: {\n              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n            },\n          }\n        : {}),\n    });\n  }\n  return transporter;\n}\n\nexport async function sendEmail(\n  to: string,\n  subject: string,\n  text: string,\n  html?: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const t = getTransporter();\n  if (!t) return false;\n\n  try {\n    await t.sendMail({\n      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n      to,\n      subject,\n      text,\n      html: html || text,\n    });\n    return true;\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    return false;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n  return isConfigured;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":60,"oldLines":5,"newStart":60,"newLines":5,"lines":[" }"," "," export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {","-  return isConfigured;","+  return checkConfigured();"," }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

(listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'rejected')\").run(listingId, joinerId);\n   281→\n   282→    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   283→    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n   284→    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ ok: boolean }>(response);\n   285→\n   286→    expect(status).toBe(200);\n   287→    expect(data.ok).toBe(true);\n   288→  });\n   289→\n   290→  it(\"calls notifyGroupFull when group becomes full\", async () => {\n   291→    const { notifyGroupFull } = await import(\"@/lib/notifications\");\n   292→    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 2 });\n   293→    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n   294→\n   295→    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   296→    await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n   297→\n   298→    expect(notifyGroupFull).toHaveBeenCalledWith(listingId);\n   299→  });\n   300→});\n   301→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"27e9c771-ea9d-4c04-a86d-2b8aef200943","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:05:31.362Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-join.test.ts","content":"    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'rejected')\").run(listingId, joinerId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ ok: boolean }>(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.ok).toBe(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"calls notifyGroupFull when group becomes full\", async () => {\n    const { notifyGroupFull } = await import(\"@/lib/notifications\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 2 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n\n    expect(notifyGroupFull).toHaveBeenCalledWith(listingId);\n  });\n});\n","numLines":22,"startLine":280,"totalLines":301}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01V3XCzZdSQ1n4SBJCbBnDpg","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-join.test.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"c98a944b-f1bf-4489-a957-91ca1be4069f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T11:05:35.556Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-join.test.ts","oldString":"    expect(notifyGroupFull).toHaveBeenCalledWith(listingId);","newString":"    expect(notifyGroupFull).toHaveBeenCalledWith(listingId, expect.any(String), expect.any(String));","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n      applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: \"Test User\" as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  notifyListingAuthor: vi.fn(),\n  notifyGroupFull: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    max_group_size: number;\n    is_full: number;\n    requires_approval: number;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, requires_approval)\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n  ).run(\n    authorId,\n    \"Test Book\",\n    \"Test Author\",\n    \"1ch/wk\",\n    \"2026-04-01\",\n    \"text\",\n    overrides.max_group_size ?? 5,\n    overrides.is_full ?? 0,\n    overrides.requires_approval ?? 0\n  );\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\nfunction createParams(id: string) {\n  return { params: Promise.resolve({ id }) };\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/listings/[id]/join\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n  let joinerId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser(\"author@example.com\", \"Author\");\n    joinerId = insertUser(\"joiner@example.com\", \"Joiner\");\n    mockSession.userId = joinerId;\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Joiner\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc/join\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999/join\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when author tries to join own listing\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"organizer\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing requires approval\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"approval\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing is already full\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"full\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when already a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, joinerId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"already a member\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"joins successfully and returns member count\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ ok: boolean; memberCount: number }>(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.ok).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.memberCount).toBe(2);\n\n    // Verify member was added in DB\n    const member = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\").get(listingId, joinerId);\n    expect(member).toBeDefined();\n  });\n\n  it(\"marks listing as full when max group size reached\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 2 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ ok: boolean; memberCount: number }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.memberCount).toBe(2);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as Record<string, number>;\n    expect(listing.is_full).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"calls notification functions on join\", async () => {\n    const { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } = await import(\"@/lib/notifications\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n\n    expect(notifyListingAuthor).toHaveBeenCalledWith(listingId, \"Joiner\");\n    expect(notifyGroupFull).not.toHaveBeenCalled();\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when user has a pending application\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, joinerId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"pending application\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"allows join when user has a rejected application\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'rejected')\").run(listingId, joinerId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    const response = await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ ok: boolean }>(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.ok).toBe(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"calls notifyGroupFull when group becomes full\", async () => {\n    const { notifyGroupFull } = await import(\"@/lib/notifications\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 2 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n    await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n\n    expect(notifyGroupFull).toHaveBeenCalledWith(listingId);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":295,"oldLines":6,"newStart":295,"newLines":6,"lines":["     const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });","     await POST(req, createParams(String(listingId)));"," ","-    expect(notifyGroupFull).toHaveBeenCalledWith(listingId);","+    expect(notifyGroupFull).toHaveBeenCalledWith(listingId, expect.any(String), expect.any(String));","   });"," });"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":1,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"d 14\"}"}},"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"5e0c02eb-4b2b-4756-b363-1ddc380413d5"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01FqoMvLECSpp5WwdooxGjPn","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015CQqPY1Z5wktRL4hUHBERm","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"Code review round 14: module-load freezing, stale sessions, TOCTOU races\" --label \"bug,approved\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Findings from code review round 14\n\n### 1. CRITICAL: BOT_TOKEN/CLIENT_ID frozen at module load time\n**Files:** `lib/telegram.ts`, `lib/discord.ts`, `lib/email.ts`\n\n`BOT_TOKEN`, `CLIENT_ID`, `TELEGRAM_API`, and `isConfigured` are assigned once at module import time. If env vars aren't available at that moment, these constants are permanently empty/false. `isBotConfigured()` checks the frozen snapshot, not `process.env`. All API calls silently use stale values.\n\n### 2. CRITICAL: requireAuth never verifies user exists in DB\n**File:** `lib/session.ts`\n\n`requireAuth()` only checks `session.userId` is truthy. A deleted user retains full session access. `session.displayName` can also go stale — any endpoint reading it for notifications trusts the cookie value, not the DB.\n\n### 3. IMPORTANT: notifyGroupFull re-queries platform_preference outside transaction\n**File:** `lib/notifications.ts`\n\nBetween the join transaction commit and this query, a concurrent PATCH could change `platform_preference`, producing a notification with the wrong platform name.\n\n### 4. IMPORTANT: PATCH listing has TOCTOU race on telegram_link/discord_link guard\n**File:** `app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts`\n\nThe guard preventing edits after a platform link is shared reads outside the transaction. A concurrent POST to /telegram could set the link between check and update.\n\n### 5. IMPORTANT: No type validation on profile PATCH\n**File:** `app/api/profile/route.ts`\n\n`displayName` and `bio` are destructured with no `typeof` check before `.trim()` — non-string input causes unhandled TypeError → 500.\nEOF\n)\" 2>&1","description":"Create issue for code review round 14"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":709,"cache_read_input_tokens":53528,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":709},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"f6a7baba-c2e7-4b2e-98ac-4b10403e4552"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01T8xTQBgdchZA3XgzeZ4kLV","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0152Sin9tLksGAfi4G9zcjEi","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cd /root/Projects/bookmate && git add app/lib/telegram.ts app/lib/discord.ts app/lib/session.ts app/lib/email.ts app/lib/notifications.ts app/app/api/profile/route.ts app/app/api/listings/\\[id\\]/route.ts app/app/api/listings/\\[id\\]/join/route.ts app/app/api/listings/\\[id\\]/applications/route.ts app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-join.test.ts && git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: module-load freezing, stale sessions, TOCTOU races, type validation (#102)\n\n- Read BOT_TOKEN/CLIENT_ID/SMTP config live from process.env instead of\n  freezing at module load time (telegram.ts, discord.ts, email.ts)\n- requireAuth now verifies user exists in DB and syncs stale displayName\n- notifyGroupFull accepts params instead of re-querying outside transaction\n- PATCH listing re-checks telegram_link/discord_link inside transaction\n- Profile PATCH validates typeof before string operations\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit all fixes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":259,"cache_read_input_tokens":54864,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":259},"output_tokens":43,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"f441a480-122d-4f93-a60c-c839c2e5a774"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"equest\"}"}},"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"0ceda390-6c39-4ddc-b745-3713b440da77"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01KDnGtiR3g8RuQcuDfHH7sd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HKXxbg3kJVikEJ1qJpF2bc","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"fix: module-load freezing, stale sessions, TOCTOU races (#102)\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- **Read env vars live** from `process.env` in `telegram.ts`, `discord.ts`, and `email.ts` instead of freezing at module load time — `isBotConfigured()` and API calls now always use current values\n- **`requireAuth` validates user existence** in DB and auto-syncs stale `displayName` from cookie — deleted users can no longer retain session access\n- **`notifyGroupFull` accepts params** (`bookTitle`, `platformPreference`) instead of re-querying outside the join transaction — eliminates stale data risk from concurrent PATCH\n- **PATCH listing re-checks platform links inside transaction** — prevents TOCTOU race where a concurrent `/telegram` or `/discord` POST sets a link between the outer guard and the update\n- **Profile PATCH type-validates** `displayName`/`bio` before `.trim()` — prevents unhandled `TypeError` on non-string input\n\nCloses #102\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] ESLint clean\n- [x] All 201 tests pass (test updated for new `notifyGroupFull` signature)\n- [x] Build succeeds\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\" 2>&1","description":"Create pull request"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":274,"cache_read_input_tokens":55561,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":274},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"4594cd9d-49f9-4612-a1e4-3640750c22e6"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01DmXDpdCpawpdiWK1fka5rw","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KYoxY4UGKxbYihWGv9p5Nm","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-1100.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-24 11:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 14: found and fixed 7 bugs across env config, session auth, transaction safety, and input validation. Created issue #102, implemented fixes in PR #103, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 201 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #102: Code review round 14 (PR #103 — merged + deployed)\n\n7 fixes:\n\n1. **BOT_TOKEN/CLIENT_ID frozen at module load time** (CRITICAL) — `telegram.ts`, `discord.ts` captured env vars into module-level constants at import time. If vars weren't set at that moment, `isBotConfigured()` permanently returned false and API calls used empty tokens. Fixed by reading `process.env` live inside helper functions.\n\n2. **`isConfigured` frozen at module load in email.ts** (IMPORTANT) — Same pattern as above for SMTP config. Fixed with `checkConfigured()` function that reads `process.env` on each call.\n\n3. **`requireAuth` never verified user existence** (CRITICAL) — Only checked `session.userId` was truthy in the cookie. A deleted user retained full access. Fixed by adding a DB existence check and auto-syncing stale `displayName` from the cookie.\n\n4. **`notifyGroupFull` re-queried `platform_preference` outside transaction** (IMPORTANT) — Between join transaction commit and this query, a concurrent PATCH could change the platform. Fixed by passing `bookTitle` and `platformPreference` as parameters from the caller (captured before/inside the transaction).\n\n5. **PATCH listing TOCTOU on platform link guard** (IMPORTANT) — The check preventing edits after a Telegram/Discord link is shared was outside the transaction. A concurrent POST could set the link in between. Fixed by re-checking inside the `updateTransaction`.\n\n6. **Profile PATCH missing type validation** (IMPORTANT) — `displayName` and `bio` were `.trim()`-ed without `typeof` check, causing unhandled TypeError on non-string input. Fixed with type guards.\n\n7. **Test updated** — `notifyGroupFull` mock expectation updated for new 3-param signature.\n\nAll 201 tests pass, ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Also Noted (not fixed this round)\n- No `ON DELETE CASCADE` on FK constraints (requires schema migration)\n- Discord webhook allows any listing to be linked to any guild by secret-holder (architectural, not a pure bug)\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: Critical — needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider ON DELETE CASCADE migration or new feature proposals\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":194,"cache_read_input_tokens":58081,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":194},"output_tokens":40,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"82bc1ed8-1a58-4aed-b36c-63da277661a1"}

If vars weren't set at that moment, `isBotConfigured()` permanently returned false and API calls used empty tokens. Fixed by reading `process.env` live inside helper functions.\n\n2. **`isConfigured` frozen at module load in email.ts** (IMPORTANT) — Same pattern as above for SMTP config. Fixed with `checkConfigured()` function that reads `process.env` on each call.\n\n3. **`requireAuth` never verified user existence** (CRITICAL) — Only checked `session.userId` was truthy in the cookie. A deleted user retained full access. Fixed by adding a DB existence check and auto-syncing stale `displayName` from the cookie.\n\n4. **`notifyGroupFull` re-queried `platform_preference` outside transaction** (IMPORTANT) — Between join transaction commit and this query, a concurrent PATCH could change the platform. Fixed by passing `bookTitle` and `platformPreference` as parameters from the caller (captured before/inside the transaction).\n\n5. **PATCH listing TOCTOU on platform link guard** (IMPORTANT) — The check preventing edits after a Telegram/Discord link is shared was outside the transaction. A concurrent POST could set the link in between. Fixed by re-checking inside the `updateTransaction`.\n\n6. **Profile PATCH missing type validation** (IMPORTANT) — `displayName` and `bio` were `.trim()`-ed without `typeof` check, causing unhandled TypeError on non-string input. Fixed with type guards.\n\n7. **Test updated** — `notifyGroupFull` mock expectation updated for new 3-param signature.\n\nAll 201 tests pass, ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Also Noted (not fixed this round)\n- No `ON DELETE CASCADE` on FK constraints (requires schema migration)\n- Discord webhook allows any listing to be linked to any guild by secret-holder (architectural, not a pure bug)\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: Critical — needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider ON DELETE CASCADE migration or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01B2hhgSPyu1cuqhXWiVQNKG","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## Session Complete — 2026-03-24 11:00 UTC\n\n### Work Done\n**Code review round 14** — found and fixed 7 bugs (issue #102, PR #103, merged + deployed):\n\n| # | Severity | Fix |\n|---|----------|-----|\n| 1 | CRITICAL | `BOT_TOKEN`/`CLIENT_ID` in `telegram.ts` & `discord.ts` frozen at module load → now read live from `process.env` |\n| 2 | CRITICAL | `requireAuth` never verified user exists in DB → now checks DB and auto-syncs stale `displayName` |\n| 3 | IMPORTANT | `isConfigured` in `email.ts` frozen at module load → now computed live |\n| 4 | IMPORTANT | `notifyGroupFull` re-queried `platform_preference` outside transaction → now accepts params from caller |\n| 5 | IMPORTANT | PATCH listing had TOCTOU race on platform link guard → re-checks inside transaction |\n| 6 | IMPORTANT | Profile PATCH missing `typeof` validation → added type guards |\n| 7 | — | Updated test for new `notifyGroupFull` signature |\n\n**All 201 tests pass, ESLint clean, build clean, CI green, production deployed and healthy (HTTP 200).**"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":274,"cache_read_input_tokens":59164,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":274},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c08cf456-6739-4bbc-8bb4-31628498e34f","uuid":"ccbcb2cc-5909-423a-aa5b-02eaf046afca"}
